entry.name: IActivatorProps
entry.description_fallback: Contract for components that open/close a floating surface via an activator element — includes pointer, hover, focus and context-menu triggers plus open/close delays.
entry.definition:
export interface IActivatorProps extends IDelayProps {
    target?: 'parent' | 'cursor' | (string & {}) | Element | ComponentPublicInstance | [x: number, y: number] | undefined
    activator?: 'parent' | 'cursor' | (string & {}) | Element | ComponentPublicInstance
    activatorProps?: any

    openOnClick?: boolean
    openOnContextMenu?: boolean
    openOnHover?: boolean
    openOnFocus?: boolean

    closeOnContentClick?: boolean
}

props.name: target
props.type_label: 'parent' | 'cursor' | (string & {}) | Element | ComponentPublicInstance | [x: number, y: number] | undefined
props.description_fallback: Override the anchor target for positioning the floating surface.

props.name: activator
props.description_fallback: Element (or CSS selector) that acts as the activator for the floating surface.

props.name: activatorProps
props.description_fallback: Extra props spread onto the activator element (e.g. aria attributes).

props.name: openOnClick
props.description_fallback: Open the surface when the activator is clicked.

props.name: openOnContextMenu
props.description_fallback: Open the surface on right-click / context-menu.

props.name: openOnHover
props.description_fallback: Open the surface when the pointer enters the activator.

props.name: openOnFocus
props.description_fallback: Open the surface when the activator gains keyboard focus.

props.name: closeOnContentClick
props.description_fallback: Automatically close the surface when the user clicks anywhere inside its content.

examples.title_fallback: Extending the interface on a floating component

entry.name: IActiveEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emit contract for components that propagate their active state — fires update:active whenever the active state changes.

examples.title_fallback: Extending the emits interface

entry.name: IActiveProps
entry.description_fallback: Controls the active/selected state of a component — accepts a boolean to force the state on, or an IActiveState object to override visual props (color, bgColor, border…) only while the state is engaged.

props.name: active
props.description_fallback: When true forces the component into its active state. When an IActiveState object, applies prop overrides (color, bgColor, border, rounded, elevation, padding, margin, gap) only while active.

props.name: activeClass
props.description_fallback: Additional CSS class applied to the root element while the component is active.

examples.title_fallback: Using active with an object override
examples.code:
<OrigamBtn :active="{ bgColor: 'primary', color: 'white' }">
    Active Button
</OrigamBtn>

entry.name: IAdjacentEmits
entry.description_fallback: Click events emitted when the user clicks the outer prepend or append slots of a component.

examples.title_fallback: Listening to adjacent click events
examples.code:
<OrigamField
    prepend-icon="mdi-magnify"
    append-icon="mdi-close"
    @click:prepend="onSearch"
    @click:append="onClear"
/>

entry.name: IAdjacentInnerEmits
entry.description_fallback: Click events for icons rendered INSIDE the input chrome — clear button, password toggle and similar inner-surface actions.

examples.title_fallback: Listening to inner adjacent click events
examples.code:
<OrigamInput
    clearable
    @click:clear="handleClear"
    @click:append-inner="togglePassword"
/>

entry.name: IAdjacentInnerProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for icons and avatars rendered INSIDE the input chrome (prepend-inner, append-inner) plus the clearable icon and its toggle.
entry.definition:
export interface IAdjacentInnerProps {
    appendInnerAvatar?: string
    appendInnerIcon?: TIcon
    prependInnerAvatar?: string
    prependInnerIcon?: TIcon
    clearIcon?: TIcon
    clearable?: boolean
}

props.name: appendInnerAvatar
props.description_fallback: URL of an avatar image rendered inside the input at the trailing edge.

props.name: appendInnerIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon rendered inside the input at the trailing edge.

props.name: prependInnerAvatar
props.description_fallback: URL of an avatar image rendered inside the input at the leading edge.

props.name: prependInnerIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon rendered inside the input at the leading edge.

props.name: clearIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon used for the clear button (defaults to mdi-close-circle).

props.name: clearable
props.description_fallback: Displays a clear button inside the input that resets the model value.

examples.title_fallback: Input with inner prepend icon and clearable
examples.code:
<OrigamInput
    prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
    clearable
    clear-icon="mdi-close"
/>

entry.name: IAdjacentInnerSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures for content rendered inside the input chrome — leading edge, trailing edge, and the clear action.

props.name: appendInner

entry.name: IAdjacentProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for icons and avatars placed OUTSIDE the component chrome (prepend, append) — used by buttons, list items, cards and similar surface components.

props.name: appendAvatar
props.description_fallback: URL of an avatar image rendered at the trailing edge of the component.

props.name: appendIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon rendered at the trailing edge of the component.

props.name: prependAvatar
props.description_fallback: URL of an avatar image rendered at the leading edge of the component.

props.name: prependIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon rendered at the leading edge of the component.

examples.title_fallback: Button with prepend and append icons
examples.code:
<OrigamBtn prepend-icon="mdi-check" append-icon="mdi-chevron-down">
    Submit
</OrigamBtn>

entry.name: IAdjacentSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures for outer prepend and append content — replaces the icon/avatar props with arbitrary markup.

props.name: prepend
props.description_fallback: Custom content rendered at the leading edge of the component, replacing prependIcon/prependAvatar.

props.name: append
props.description_fallback: Custom content rendered at the trailing edge of the component, replacing appendIcon/appendAvatar.

examples.title_fallback: Custom prepend slot
examples.code:
<OrigamBtn>
    <template #prepend>
        <OrigamAvatar src="/user.jpg" size="sm" />
    </template>
    Profile
</OrigamBtn>

entry.name: IAlertEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emits contract for <OrigamAlert> — extends the shared component emits with close-button and hover propagation.
entry.definition: export interface IAlertEmits extends ICommonsComponentEmits, IClickCloseEmits, IHoverEmits {}

examples.title_fallback: Listening to close on OrigamAlert
examples.code:
<OrigamAlert closable @click:close="onClose">
    Something went wrong.
</OrigamAlert>

entry.name: IAlertProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamAlert> — closable banner with optional icon, title, text, v-model visibility and the full design surface (color, border, spacing, elevation, position).
entry.definition:
export interface IAlertProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IBorderProps, IDimensionProps, IPaddingProps, IMarginProps, IDensityProps, IElevationProps, ILocationProps, IPositionProps, IRoundedProps, IStatusProps, IHoverProps, IAdjacentProps, ITypographyProps {
    closable?: boolean
    closeIcon?: TIcon
    closeLabel?: string
    modelValue?: boolean
    title?: string
    text?: string
}

props.name: closable
props.description_fallback: Shows a close button on the alert. Triggers the click:close emit when pressed.

props.name: closeIcon
props.description_fallback: Custom icon for the close button. Defaults to the DS close icon.

props.name: closeLabel
props.description_fallback: Accessible label for the close button (aria-label). Defaults to "Close".

props.name: modelValue
props.description_fallback: Controls the visibility of the alert via v-model. When false the alert is hidden.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Bold heading rendered above the alert body.

props.name: text
props.description_fallback: Body text of the alert. Rendered inside the default slot when the slot is not used.

examples.title_fallback: Closable danger alert with v-model
examples.code:
<OrigamAlert
    v-model="show"
    color="danger"
    closable
    title="Error"
    text="Something went wrong."
/>

entry.name: IAlignProps
entry.description_fallback: Responsive alignment contract — sets the cross-axis alignment (align-items / justify-content) at each breakpoint independently.
entry.definition:
export interface IAlignProps {
    align?: TAlign,
    alignSm?: TAlign,
    alignMd?: TAlign,
    alignLg?: TAlign,
    alignXl?: TAlign,
    alignXxl?: TAlign
}

props.name: align
props.description_fallback: Default alignment applied at all breakpoints unless overridden.

props.name: alignSm
props.description_fallback: Alignment override for the sm breakpoint and above.

props.name: alignMd
props.description_fallback: Alignment override for the md breakpoint and above.

props.name: alignLg
props.description_fallback: Alignment override for the lg breakpoint and above.

props.name: alignXl
props.description_fallback: Alignment override for the xl breakpoint and above.

props.name: alignXxl
props.description_fallback: Alignment override for the xxl breakpoint.

examples.title_fallback: Responsive alignment on a Row
examples.code:
<OrigamRow align="start" align-md="center" align-lg="end">
    <OrigamCol>Col 1</OrigamCol>
    <OrigamCol>Col 2</OrigamCol>
</OrigamRow>

entry.name: IAppBarProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamAppBar> — a docked layout item that extends IToolbarProps (minus width/minWidth/maxWidth/floating) and ILayoutItemProps (minus absolute), plus scroll-driven behaviour and block-axis placement.

props.name: location
props.description_fallback: Block-axis edge where the bar is docked. Accepts "top" or "bottom". Defaults to "top".

props.name: image
props.description_fallback: Background image for the app bar surface. Accepts an IImgProps descriptor (src, srcset, lazy-src, etc.).

examples.title_fallback: App bar docked at the bottom with elevation
examples.code:
<OrigamAppBar location="bottom" :elevation="4">
    <OrigamToolbarTitle>My App</OrigamToolbarTitle>
</OrigamAppBar>

entry.name: IAppEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emits contract for <OrigamApp> — delegates entirely to the shared component emits; no additional events are fired by the application shell.
entry.definition: export interface IAppEmits extends ICommonsComponentEmits {}

examples.title_fallback: Extending IAppEmits in a host component

import type { IAppEmits } from 'origam'

interface IMyAppEmits extends IAppEmits {}

entry.name: IAppProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamApp> — thin application-shell wrapper over OrigamLayout, exposing only color, bgColor, fullHeight and overlaps. Intentionally omits the full design surface (border, rounded, elevation, spacing) that belongs on OrigamLayout directly.

props.name: fullHeight
props.description_fallback: Stretches the layout to the full viewport (100vw / 100vh). Defaults to true.

props.name: overlaps
props.description_fallback: IDs of layout items that are allowed to overlap each other. Forwarded to the underlying OrigamLayout.

examples.title_fallback: Full-height app shell with primary background
examples.code:
<OrigamApp bg-color="primary" :full-height="true">
    <OrigamAppBar />
    <OrigamMain />
</OrigamApp>

entry.name: IAudioEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emits surfaced by <OrigamAudio>. Event names mirror native DOM audio events one-to-one, plus v-model bindings for playbackRate, currentTrackIndex, loopMode and shuffle.
entry.definition:
export interface IAudioEmits {
    (e: 'play'): void
    (e: 'pause'): void
    (e: 'ended'): void
    (e: 'timeupdate', event: Event): void
    (e: 'volumechange', event: Event): void
    (e: 'loadedmetadata', event: Event): void
    (e: 'error', payload: Event | MediaError | Error): void
    /** Two-way binding for the playback rate. The component DOES NOT
     *  set this in response to the consumer's prop changes — only
     *  when the user picks a rate from the config menu. */
    (e: 'update:playbackRate', rate: number): void
    /** Fired when the listener clicks the "Download" row in the
     *  config menu. Payload is the URL of the file. */
    (e: 'download', url: string): void
    /** Fires once per waveform recomputation (typically when `src`
     *  changes). Payload is the downsampled peaks array (0..1
     *  amplitudes). Ported from `ISoundEmits['waveform']`. */
    (e: 'waveform', peaks: Array<number>): void
    /** Fires when the listener clicks the "previous track" button.
     *  Always emitted alongside the in-component navigation (playlist
     *  jump if a playlist is set, otherwise the listener can implement
     *  its own previous logic). */
    (e: 'previous'): void
    /** Fires when the listener clicks the "next track" button. Same
     *  contract as `previous`. */
    (e: 'next'): void
    /** Two-way binding for the active playlist index. Fires when the
     *  user clicks a track in the list, presses prev / next, or when
     *  the player auto-advances on `ended`. */
    (e: 'update:currentTrackIndex', index: number): void
    /** Two-way binding for the loop mode. Fires when the user cycles
     *  the loop button (`none` → `all` → `one` → `none`). */
    (e: 'update:loopMode', mode: TAudioLoopMode): void
    /** Two-way binding for the shuffle flag. Fires when the user
     *  toggles the shuffle button. */
    (e: 'update:shuffle', shuffle: boolean): void
    /** Fires whenever the active track changes (manual click, prev /
     *  next, auto-advance). Payload is the new track descriptor. */
    (e: 'track-change', track: IAudioTrack, index: number): void
}

examples.title_fallback: Listening to track-change on OrigamAudio
examples.code:
<OrigamAudio
    :src="track.src"
    @track-change="onTrackChange"
    @ended="onEnded"
/>

entry.name: IAudioPlayerEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emit signatures recommended for audio host components using useAudioPlayer. Extends the media-agnostic IMediaPlayerEmits baseline — the composable itself does not emit; this interface is for the host SFC defineEmits contract.
entry.definition: export interface IAudioPlayerEmits extends IMediaPlayerEmits {}

examples.title_fallback: Using IAudioPlayerEmits in a host SFC
examples.code:
import type { IAudioPlayerEmits } from 'origam'

const emit = defineEmits<IAudioPlayerEmits>()

entry.name: IAudioPlayerMethods
entry.description_fallback: Imperative methods returned by useAudioPlayer (Audio namespace). Extends the media-agnostic IMediaPlayerMethods baseline. Kept as a distinct symbol so audio-specific commands can be added without churn on consumer types.
entry.definition: export interface IAudioPlayerMethods extends IMediaPlayerMethods {}

examples.title_fallback: Calling methods from useAudioPlayer

entry.name: IAudioPlayerState
entry.description_fallback: Reactive state surface returned by useAudioPlayer (Audio namespace). Extends the media-agnostic IMediaPlayerState baseline. Future audio-specific extensions (waveform analysis, frequency bins) have a home here without breaking existing imports.
entry.definition: export interface IAudioPlayerState extends IMediaPlayerState {}

examples.title_fallback: Reading reactive state from useAudioPlayer
examples.code:
const { state } = useAudioPlayer({ audioRef })
console.log(state.playing, state.currentTime, state.duration)

entry.name: IAudioProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamAudio> — composes useAudioPlayer with OrigamMediaController to paint an opinionated audio card (cover + title/artist + transport bar). Exposes variant, cover, playlist, loop mode, shuffle, waveform, playback rates and the full design surface.
entry.definition:
export interface IAudioProps
    extends ICommonsComponentProps,
        ITagProps,
        IRoundedProps,
        IBorderProps,
        IDimensionProps,
        IMarginProps,
        IPaddingProps,
        IElevationProps,
        IPositionProps,
        IColorProps,
        IBgColorProps,
        ITypographyProps {
    /**
     * Visual variant of the audio surface.
     *
     * - `'expanded'` — full Stemtracks studio strip: 96 px cover,
     *                  title / artist / album header, waveform mini
     *                  scrubber above the transport row.
     * - `'compact'`  — slim transport-only dock: 48 px cover, inline
     *                  metadata, no waveform, transport row only.
     *
     * Legacy `'normal'` / `'minimal'` alias values remain accepted for
     * backward compatibility and resolve to `'expanded'` / `'compact'`.
     *
     * @default 'expanded'
     */
    variant?: TAudioVariant
    /**
     * Side of the surface where the album cover is painted. The
     * controller column sits on the opposite side. Swap to keep the
     * cover next to the page edge (e.g. against a left sidebar).
     *
     * @default 'left'
     */
    coverPosition?: TCoverPosition
    /**
     * Media URL — either a single string for `<audio src>`, an
     * `IAudioSource` object (`{ src, type }`), or an array of sources
     * for codec fallback. The browser walks the array top-down and
     * picks the first source whose `type` it can decode.
     */
    src: string | IAudioSource | Array<IAudioSource>
    /**
     * Optional captions / chapters tracks attached to the `<audio>`.
     * Reuses the video track shape (kind / src / srclang / label /
     * default) so consumers learn the API once.
     *
     * @default []
     */
    tracks?: Array<IVideoTrack>
    /**
     * Optional title shown above the controls (e.g. `"Podcast Episode 42"`).
     */
    title?: string
    /**
     * Optional artist / author shown next to the title.
     */
    artist?: string
    /**
     * Optional album name shown below the artist (ported from
     * `ISoundMetadata.album`). Renders only when set.
     */
    album?: string
    /**
     * Optional cover image shown next to the title. Accepts a URL
     * string or an `ISrcObject` for srcset / lazy-src support.
     */
    cover?: string | ISrcObject
    /**
     * Display the computed waveform above the controls. Pass `true`
     * to force the computation (when supported); pass `'auto'` to
     * activate it only when the browser supports `OfflineAudioContext`.
     * SSR + jsdom fall through to `false`.
     *
     * The decoder lives in `useWaveform` — fetch + decode through
     * `OfflineAudioContext` + downsample channel 0 to 200 peaks.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    waveform?: boolean | 'auto'
    /**
     * Stroke colour for the *played* portion of the waveform bars.
     * Default `'currentColor'` so the waveform inherits the
     * typographic theme. Override via the prop OR via
     * `--origam-audio__waveform---color-played` directly on the wrapper.
     *
     * @default 'currentColor'
     */
    waveformColor?: string
    /**
     * Starts playback as soon as `loadedmetadata` fires. Most
     * browsers require `muted=true` alongside `autoplay`; the
     * component forces `muted=true` when the consumer asks for
     * autoplay without an explicit `muted` value.
     *
     * **Accessibility:** `autoplay` is suppressed when the user has
     * requested reduced motion.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    autoplay?: boolean
    /**
     * Starts the player muted.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    muted?: boolean
    /**
     * Legacy loop flag. When `true` is mapped to `loopMode='one'` at
     * runtime so a v0.x consumer keeps the "loop this track forever"
     * behaviour without source change. Prefer `loopMode` for new code.
     *
     * @deprecated Use `loopMode` instead.
     * @default false
     */
    loop?: boolean
    /**
     * Tri-state loop strategy when a playlist is active. Cycled by the
     * loop button in the transport row:
     *   - `'none'` → no loop, playback stops after the last track
     *   - `'all'`  → loop the playlist, wrap from last to first
     *   - `'one'`  → loop the current track on its own `ended`
     *
     * For a single-track usage (`src` only, no `playlist`), `'one'`
     * keeps the legacy `loop` behaviour and `'all'` is equivalent to
     * `'one'` (there's no next track to wrap to).
     *
     * @default 'none'
     */
    loopMode?: TAudioLoopMode
    /**
     * Shuffle the playlist order when navigating with prev / next or
     * auto-advancing on track end. The shuffled order is computed
     * deterministically (Fisher-Yates seeded by playlist length) so
     * consumers can re-render predictably; opt out of stability by
     * controlling the playlist array externally.
     *
     * Has no visible effect when no `playlist` is provided.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    shuffle?: boolean
    /**
     * Optional list of tracks to play sequentially. When set, the
     * `prev` / `next` transport buttons navigate the list instead of
     * skipping 10 s, the cover / metadata strip switches to the active
     * track, and a clickable list renders below the transport.
     *
     * Mutually informative with the top-level `src` prop: if `src`
     * AND `playlist` are both set, `playlist` wins and `src` is
     * ignored. The active track is `playlist[currentTrackIndex]`.
     */
    playlist?: Array<IAudioTrack>
    /**
     * Index of the currently-active track in the `playlist`. Supports
     * `v-model:currentTrackIndex` for two-way binding (parent stays the
     * source of truth for which track is playing).
     *
     * @default 0
     */
    currentTrackIndex?: number
    /**
     * Buffering hint. `'metadata'` (default) loads just enough to
     * compute the duration; `'none'` defers everything until the
     * user presses play; `'auto'` lets the browser pre-buffer.
     *
     * @default 'metadata'
     */
    preload?: 'none' | 'metadata' | 'auto'
    /**
     * Mirrors the native `crossorigin` attribute. Required when the
     * media is served from a CORS-enabled origin and the consumer
     * needs WebAudio access to the decoded samples.
     */
    crossorigin?: string
    /**
     * Which control surface to render. `'custom'` paints the
     * `<OrigamMediaController>` shell; `'native'` exposes the
     * browser's built-in `controls` attribute on the `<audio>`.
     *
     * @default 'custom'
     */
    controls?: TAudioControls
    /**
     * Available playback rates exposed via the config menu.
     *
     * @default [0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2]
     */
    playbackRates?: ReadonlyArray<number>
    /**
     * Initial playback rate. The runtime value is exposed via the
     * `update:playbackRate` emit.
     *
     * @default 1
     */
    playbackRate?: number
    /**
     * Enable the cast / AirPlay button (Remote Playback API). The
     * button only renders when this flag is true AND at least one
     * cast-capable device is detected.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    allowRemotePlayback?: boolean
    /**
     * Adds a "Download" row to the cog menu that lets the listener
     * download the currently-playing audio file.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    downloadable?: boolean
    /**
     * Override the downloaded file name. Defaults to the trailing
     * segment of the source URL.
     */
    downloadFilename?: string
}

props.name: variant
props.description_fallback: Visual variant: 'expanded' (full strip with waveform) or 'compact' (slim transport dock).

props.name: coverPosition
props.description_fallback: Side of the surface where the album cover is painted. The controller sits on the opposite side.

props.name: src
props.description_fallback: Media URL — a single string, an IAudioSource object or an array for codec fallback.

props.name: tracks
props.description_fallback: Optional captions/chapters tracks attached to the audio element.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Optional title shown above the controls.

props.name: artist
props.description_fallback: Optional artist/author shown next to the title.

props.name: album
props.description_fallback: Optional album name shown below the artist.

props.name: cover
props.description_fallback: Optional cover image (URL string or ISrcObject for srcset/lazy-src support).

props.name: waveform
props.description_fallback: Display the computed waveform above controls. 'auto' activates only when OfflineAudioContext is supported.

props.name: waveformColor
props.description_fallback: Stroke colour for the played portion of the waveform bars.

props.name: autoplay
props.description_fallback: Starts playback as soon as loadedmetadata fires. Suppressed when the user has requested reduced motion.

props.name: muted
props.description_fallback: Starts the player muted.

props.name: loop
props.description_fallback: Legacy loop flag — maps to loopMode="one". Prefer loopMode for new code.

props.name: loopMode
props.description_fallback: Tri-state loop strategy: 'none', 'all' (loop playlist) or 'one' (loop current track).

props.name: shuffle
props.description_fallback: Shuffle the playlist order when navigating with prev/next or auto-advancing.

props.name: playlist
props.description_fallback: Optional list of tracks to play sequentially.

props.name: currentTrackIndex
props.description_fallback: Index of the currently-active track in the playlist. Supports v-model:currentTrackIndex.

props.name: preload
props.description_fallback: Buffering hint: 'metadata', 'none' or 'auto'.

props.name: crossorigin
props.description_fallback: Mirrors the native crossorigin attribute. Required when CORS-enabled origin needs WebAudio access.

props.name: controls
props.description_fallback: Which control surface to render: 'custom' paints OrigamMediaController; 'native' uses the browser built-in controls.

props.name: playbackRates
props.description_fallback: Available playback rates exposed via the config menu.

props.name: playbackRate
props.description_fallback: Initial playback rate.

props.name: allowRemotePlayback
props.description_fallback: Enable the cast/AirPlay button (Remote Playback API).

props.name: downloadable
props.description_fallback: Adds a Download row to the cog menu.

props.name: downloadFilename
props.description_fallback: Override the downloaded file name. Defaults to the trailing segment of the source URL.

examples.title_fallback: Audio player with playlist and waveform
examples.code:
<OrigamAudio
    :playlist="tracks"
    v-model:current-track-index="activeIndex"
    loop-mode="all"
    :waveform="true"
    cover="/default-cover.jpg"
/>

entry.name: IAudioScopedSlotBindings
entry.description_fallback: Bindings handed to the #controls scoped slot of <OrigamAudio>. State is exposed as plain unwrapped values (snapshot at render time) — Vue reactive re-invokes the slot on every meaningful change.
entry.definition:
export interface IAudioScopedSlotBindings {
    playing: boolean
    paused: boolean
    currentTime: number
    duration: number
    buffered: number
    volume: number
    muted: boolean
    playbackRate: number
    loading: boolean
    error: MediaError | Error | null
    methods: IAudioPlayerMethods
}

props.name: playing
props.description_fallback: True while the audio is actively playing.

props.name: paused
props.description_fallback: True while the audio is paused.

props.name: currentTime
props.description_fallback: Current playhead position in seconds.

props.name: duration
props.description_fallback: Total duration of the current track in seconds.

props.name: buffered
props.description_fallback: Amount of audio buffered, in seconds.

props.name: volume
props.description_fallback: Current volume level (0..1).

props.name: muted
props.description_fallback: True when the audio is muted.

props.name: playbackRate
props.description_fallback: Current playback rate (e.g. 1 = normal speed, 2 = double speed).

props.name: loading
props.description_fallback: True while the audio source is loading.

props.name: error
props.description_fallback: The current error object, or null when no error.

props.name: methods
props.description_fallback: Imperative player methods (play, pause, seek, setVolume, …) from useAudioPlayer.

examples.title_fallback: Custom controls via the #controls scoped slot

entry.name: IAudioSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures for <OrigamAudio>. Provides override points for the metadata strip, cover image, title, waveform canvas, transport controls, loading overlay and error overlay.

props.name: metadata
props.description_fallback: Override the entire title/artist/cover strip.

props.name: cover
props.description_fallback: Override the cover image or placeholder.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Override the title rendering.

props.name: waveform
props.type_label: (bindings: { peaks: Array<number>; currentTime: number; duration: number }) => any
props.description_fallback: Override the waveform canvas. Receives peaks array + playhead context for custom rendering via SVG, WebGL or canvas.

props.name: controls
props.description_fallback: Override the entire controls (replaces the default OrigamMediaController). Receives IAudioScopedSlotBindings.

props.name: loading
props.description_fallback: Overlay rendered while the media is loading.

props.name: error
props.description_fallback: Overlay rendered when an error occurred. Receives the error object.

examples.title_fallback: Custom error overlay via the #error slot

entry.name: IAudioSource
entry.description_fallback: A single <source> entry when the consumer passes multiple audio URLs (typically one mp3 + one ogg so the browser picks whichever codec it can decode). Mirrors IVideoSource minus video-specific fields.

props.name: src
props.description_fallback: Absolute or root-relative URL to the audio file.

props.name: type
props.description_fallback: MIME type — "audio/mpeg", "audio/ogg", "audio/wav", "application/vnd.apple.mpegurl" for HLS, etc. Optional but recommended.

examples.title_fallback: Codec fallback array with IAudioSource
examples.code:
<OrigamAudio :src="[
    { src: '/audio/track.mp3', type: 'audio/mpeg' },
    { src: '/audio/track.ogg', type: 'audio/ogg' }
]" />

entry.name: IAudioTrack
entry.description_fallback: Descriptor for a single track in an <OrigamAudio> playlist. The src field is mandatory; title, artist, album and cover are optional metadata surfaced on the player chrome when the track becomes active.

props.name: src
props.description_fallback: Absolute or root-relative audio URL, an IAudioSource object, or an array for codec fallback.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Display title for this track. Falls back to the root title prop when omitted.

props.name: artist
props.description_fallback: Display artist. Falls back to the root artist prop.

props.name: album
props.description_fallback: Display album. Falls back to the root album prop.

props.name: cover
props.description_fallback: Cover image URL. Falls back to the root cover prop.

props.name: duration
props.description_fallback: Optional pre-known duration in seconds. Shown in the playlist list before the audio is loaded; overridden by runtime metadata once loaded.

props.name: id
props.description_fallback: Optional stable identifier used as the list key. Defaults to the array index when omitted.

examples.title_fallback: Playlist of IAudioTrack items
examples.code:
const playlist: IAudioTrack[] = [
    { src: '/music/track1.mp3', title: 'Track One', artist: 'Artist A', cover: '/covers/1.jpg' },
    { src: '/music/track2.mp3', title: 'Track Two', artist: 'Artist B', duration: 210 },
]

entry.name: IAutocompleteProps
entry.description_fallback: Props controlling the autocomplete / combobox behaviour — search text, delimiters, auto-select and clear-on-select.
entry.definition:
export interface IAutocompleteProps {
    autoSelectFirst?: boolean | string
    clearOnSelect?: boolean
    delimiters?: Array<string>
    search?: string
    autocomplete?: boolean
}

props.name: autoSelectFirst
props.description_fallback: Automatically selects the first suggestion when the list opens. Pass "exact" to select only on exact match.

props.name: clearOnSelect
props.description_fallback: Clears the search text after the user picks an item.

props.name: delimiters
props.description_fallback: Array of characters that trigger chip creation in a combobox (e.g. [",", " "]).

props.name: search
props.description_fallback: The current search / filter string, bound via v-model:search.

props.name: autocomplete
props.description_fallback: Enables native browser autocomplete on the underlying input.

examples.title_fallback: Autocomplete with auto-select and clear on select
examples.code:
<OrigamAutocomplete
    :items="countries"
    auto-select-first
    clear-on-select
    v-model:search="query"
/>

entry.name: IAvatarGroupProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamAvatarGroup> — stacked / inline row of avatars with overflow management, expand-on-hover/click, and the full design surface (color, border, elevation, spacing, density, size, rounded).

props.name: items
props.description_fallback: Array of avatar descriptor objects. Each item accepts the full IAvatarProps surface.

props.name: max
props.description_fallback: Maximum number of avatars to display before showing a +N overflow indicator.

props.name: expandOnHover
props.description_fallback: Spread the avatar stack when the group is hovered.

props.name: expandOnClick
props.description_fallback: Spread the avatar stack when the group is clicked.

entry.name: IAvatarProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamAvatar> — renders an image, icon or text inside a circular (or rounded) container. Exposes the full design surface (color, border, elevation, spacing, density, size, rounded) plus interactive hover and active state props.

props.name: icon
props.description_fallback: Renders an icon centered inside the avatar. Mutually exclusive with image and text: image wins, then icon, then text.

props.name: image
props.description_fallback: Avatar image — a URL string or an ISrcObject for srcset / lazy-src support. Takes precedence over icon and text.

props.name: text
props.description_fallback: Initials or short text rendered inside the avatar when no image or icon is provided.

examples.title_fallback: Avatar with image and border
examples.code:
<OrigamAvatar
    image="/users/alice.jpg"
    size="lg"
    :rounded="true"
    border
    border-color="primary"
/>

entry.name: IBadgeProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamBadge> — a floating status indicator anchored to a child element. Supports numeric content, dot mode, floating/inline placement, offset, v-model visibility, and the full color/border/rounded/elevation/transition design surface.
entry.definition:
export interface IBadgeProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IBorderProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, ILocationProps, IRoundedProps, ITransitionComponentProps, IStatusProps, IHoverProps, IElevationProps, ITypographyProps {
    content?: number | string
    dot?: boolean
    floating?: boolean
    inline?: boolean
    label?: string
    max?: number | string
    modelValue?: boolean
    offsetX?: number | string
    offsetY?: number | string
}

props.name: content
props.description_fallback: Text or number rendered inside the badge pill. When omitted the badge shows as an unlabelled dot.

props.name: dot
props.description_fallback: Forces a minimal dot badge regardless of the content prop.

props.name: floating
props.description_fallback: Positions the badge absolutely over the top-right corner of its parent (default floating behaviour).

props.name: inline
props.description_fallback: Renders the badge inline with adjacent content instead of positioned absolutely.

props.name: label
props.description_fallback: Accessible aria-label for the badge (for screen readers when content is a number).

props.name: max
props.description_fallback: Maximum numeric value to display. When content exceeds max, renders "{max}+" (e.g. "99+").

props.name: modelValue
props.description_fallback: Controls the visibility of the badge via v-model.

props.name: offsetX
props.description_fallback: Horizontal offset from the anchor edge in pixels or CSS length.

props.name: offsetY
props.description_fallback: Vertical offset from the anchor edge in pixels or CSS length.

examples.title_fallback: Notification badge with max cap
examples.code:
<OrigamBadge :content="unreadCount" :max="99" color="danger" floating>
    <OrigamBtn icon="mdi-bell" />
</OrigamBadge>

entry.name: IBgColorProps
entry.description_fallback: Background-only color contract — extended by components that own a surface (Btn, Card, Badge, Alert…). Kept orthogonal to IColorProps so a component can opt into one axis independently.

props.name: bgColor
props.description_fallback: Background (surface) color — an intent name, raw CSS color, gradient string or structured gradient object.

examples.title_fallback: Extending the interface on a surface component

entry.name: IBlockquoteProps
entry.description_fallback: Full props contract for <OrigamBlockquote> — typographic citation component built on <blockquote>. Exposes five visual variants, author/source attribution, locale-aware decorative quote marks, horizontal alignment, and the full design surface (color, border, spacing, elevation, rounded).
entry.definition:
export interface IBlockquoteProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IRoundedProps, IElevationProps, IBorderProps, IPaddingProps, IMarginProps, ITypographyProps {
    /**
     * Visual variant. See `TBlockquoteVariant` for the per-variant
     * typographic contract.
     *
     * @default 'default'
     */
    variant?: TBlockquoteVariant
    /**
     * Author of the citation. Rendered after the body as `— Author`.
     * When `source` is also set, the two are joined with a comma.
     * Can be overridden via the `#author` slot for custom rendering
     * (e.g. wrap in a link to a bio page).
     */
    author?: string
    /**
     * Source of the citation (book, publication, URL label, …).
     * Rendered after `author` as `, Source`. Can be overridden via
     * the `#source` slot. When `cite` is also set on the prop, the
     * source label is wrapped in a `<cite>` element pointing at the
     * URL.
     */
    source?: string
    /**
     * URL the citation references. Maps 1:1 to the HTML `cite`
     * attribute on the rendered `<blockquote>` (or `<q>`). Pass a
     * fully-qualified URL — the browser exposes it to assistive tech
     * and to user-agent inspectors but does not render it visually.
     */
    cite?: string
    /**
     * Locale hint that determines which decorative quote glyphs render
     * for `variant="quoted"`. See `TBlockquoteLang`.
     *
     * @default 'auto'
     */
    lang?: TBlockquoteLang
    /**
     * Horizontal alignment of the citation body and attribution. The
     * `pull` variant forces `'center'` when this prop is left empty;
     * other variants default to `'left'`.
     *
     * @default 'left'
     */
    align?: TBlockquoteAlign
}

props.name: variant
props.description_fallback: Visual variant — 'default', 'bordered', 'pull', 'quoted' or 'minimal'. Controls typography and decorative elements.

props.name: author
props.description_fallback: Author of the citation. Rendered after the body as "— Author". Can be overridden via the #author slot.

props.name: source
props.description_fallback: Source of the citation (book, publication, URL label). Rendered after author as ", Source". Can be overridden via the #source slot.

props.name: cite
props.description_fallback: URL the citation references. Maps 1:1 to the HTML cite attribute on the rendered <blockquote>.

props.name: lang
props.description_fallback: Locale hint that determines which decorative quote glyphs render for variant='quoted'.

props.name: align
props.description_fallback: Horizontal alignment of the citation body and attribution. The 'pull' variant forces 'center' when this prop is left empty.

examples.title_fallback: Quoted blockquote with author and source
examples.code:
<OrigamBlockquote
    variant="quoted"
    author="Marie Curie"
    source="Nobel Lecture, 1911"
    lang="fr"
>
    Rien dans la vie n'est a craindre, tout est a comprendre.
</OrigamBlockquote>

entry.name: IBlockquoteSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures for <OrigamBlockquote>. The default slot owns the citation body; author and source are optional overrides for custom rendering. When a slot is provided it wins over the matching prop.

props.name: default
props.description_fallback: Citation body content. Replaces inline text when provided.

props.name: author
props.description_fallback: Override for the author attribution. Wins over the author prop when provided.

props.name: source
props.description_fallback: Override for the source attribution. Wins over the source prop when provided.

examples.title_fallback: Custom author slot with a link

}

entry.name: IBorderProps
entry.description_fallback: Full border contract — shorthand plus per-side, logical (block/inline), color and style props, consumed via useBorder().borderClasses and borderStyles.
entry.definition:
export interface IBorderProps {
    border?: boolean | number | string | TDirectionBoth | Array<TDirectionBoth>
    borderTop?: boolean | number | string
    borderLeft?: boolean | number | string
    borderBottom?: boolean | number | string
    borderRight?: boolean | number | string
    borderBlock?: boolean | number | string
    borderInline?: boolean | number | string
    borderColor?: string
    borderStyle?: string
}

props.name: border
props.description_fallback: Shorthand border — true enables all sides, a number sets width in px, a string sets the full CSS value, or a direction / array of directions.

props.name: borderTop
props.description_fallback: Top border — true, a px width or a full CSS border value.

props.name: borderLeft
props.description_fallback: Left border — true, a px width or a full CSS border value.

props.name: borderBottom
props.description_fallback: Bottom border — true, a px width or a full CSS border value.

props.name: borderRight
props.description_fallback: Right border — true, a px width or a full CSS border value.

props.name: borderBlock
props.description_fallback: Logical block-axis border (top + bottom in horizontal writing modes).

props.name: borderInline
props.description_fallback: Logical inline-axis border (left + right in horizontal writing modes).

props.name: borderColor
props.description_fallback: Border color — a CSS color value or a design token name.

props.name: borderStyle
props.description_fallback: Border style — solid, dashed, dotted, etc.

examples.title_fallback: Card with dashed primary border
examples.code:
<OrigamCard border border-color="primary" border-style="dashed">
    Content
</OrigamCard>

entry.description_fallback: Emit contract for <OrigamBottomNav> — propagates active-state and hover-state changes through the shared Commons, IActiveEmits and IHoverEmits contracts.

entry.name: IBottomNavProps
entry.description_fallback: Props contract for <OrigamBottomNav> — a fixed navigation bar with item buttons, supporting grow mode, placement position, transition, and the full cross-cutting surface (color, bgColor, border, elevation, margin, dimension, density, rounded, layout, group, hover, active).
entry.definition:
export interface IBottomNavProps extends ITagProps, ICommonsComponentProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IPaddingProps, IBorderProps, IElevationProps, IMarginProps, IDimensionProps, IDensityProps, IRoundedProps, ILayoutItemProps, IGroupProps, IHoverProps, IActiveProps, ITransitionComponentProps {
    grow?: boolean
    mode?: TNavMode
    items?: Array<IBtnProps>
    /**
     * Horizontal placement of the bar when it does not span the full width
     * (e.g. a custom `width`): `'start'` (inline-start), `'center'` or
     * `'end'` (inline-end).
     *
     * @default 'start'
     */
    position?: TBottomNavPosition
}

props.name: grow
props.description_fallback: Make each item button grow to fill the available width equally.

props.name: mode
props.description_fallback: Display mode of the bottom nav bar.

props.name: items
props.description_fallback: Array of button props used to render nav items declaratively.

props.name: position
props.description_fallback: Horizontal placement of the bar when it does not span the full width: start (inline-start), center or end (inline-end).

examples.title_fallback: Declarative bottom nav with grow items
examples.code:

  :items="navItems"
  grow
  color="primary"
  position="center"

entry.name: IBox
entry.description_fallback: Bounding-box snapshot — the shape returned by useResizeObserver and intersection utilities, describing an element's position and dimensions in the viewport.
entry.definition:
export interface IBox {
    x: number
    y: number
    width: number
    height: number

    top: number
    bottom: number
    left: number
    right: number
}

props.name: x
props.description_fallback: Horizontal distance from the left of the viewport.

props.name: y
props.description_fallback: Vertical distance from the top of the viewport.

props.name: width
props.description_fallback: Width of the element in pixels.

props.name: height
props.description_fallback: Height of the element in pixels.

props.name: top
props.description_fallback: Distance from the top of the viewport (same as y).

props.name: bottom
props.description_fallback: Distance from the top of the viewport to the bottom edge (top + height).

props.name: left
props.description_fallback: Distance from the left of the viewport (same as x).

props.name: right
props.description_fallback: Distance from the left of the viewport to the right edge (left + width).

entry.name: IBoxPlotStats
entry.description_fallback: Five-number summary and outlier list produced by the computeQuartiles utility — exported so consumers can type the return value without importing the utility directly.

props.name: min
props.description_fallback: Minimum non-outlier value (lower whisker tip).

props.name: q1
props.description_fallback: First quartile (25th percentile).

props.name: median
props.description_fallback: Median (50th percentile).

props.name: q3
props.description_fallback: Third quartile (75th percentile).

props.name: max
props.description_fallback: Maximum non-outlier value (upper whisker tip).

props.name: iqr
props.description_fallback: Interquartile range — IQR = Q3 − Q1.

props.name: outliers
props.description_fallback: Values outside the 1.5·IQR fences.

entry.name: IBracketCompetitor
entry.description_fallback: A single competitor or team in a bracket match — intentionally generic (no sport/e-sport-specific distinction). Consumers can stash any extra payload under metadata.

props.name: id
props.description_fallback: Stable identifier — used to detect the winner via winnerId.

props.name: name
props.description_fallback: Display name (team name, player tag, …).

props.name: seed
props.description_fallback: Optional seed number (1 = top seed). Rendered before the name when showSeed is enabled.

props.name: avatar
props.description_fallback: Optional avatar URL (team logo, country flag, player portrait). Rendered as a small left of the name.

props.name: metadata
props.description_fallback: Free-form payload — never read by the component.

examples.title_fallback: Creating a competitor object
examples.code:
import type { IBracketCompetitor } from 'origam'

const competitor: IBracketCompetitor = {
    id: 'team-liquid',
    name: 'Team Liquid',
    seed: 1,
    avatar: '/logos/team-liquid.png',
}

entry.name: IBracketCompetitorProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamBracketCompetitor> — a single competitor row. Carries the full cross-cutting surface (color, bgColor, rounded, elevation, border, density, dimension, padding, margin) so a standalone row behaves like any other origam component.
entry.definition:
export interface IBracketCompetitorProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IHoverProps, IActiveProps, IRoundedProps, IElevationProps, IBorderProps, IDensityProps, IDimensionProps, IPaddingProps, IMarginProps, ITypographyProps {
    /**
     * The competitor payload. `null` renders a "TBD" placeholder — used
     * when the match's participant is not yet determined (winner of an
     * earlier round, byes, …).
     */
    competitor: IBracketCompetitor | null
    /** Optional score — accepts string for non-numeric markers. */
    score?: number | string
    /**
     * Whether to apply the `--winner` modifier class (bolder text,
     * intent-tinted background).
     *
     * @default false
     */
    isWinner?: boolean
    /**
     * Mirror the player-is-loser state. Used to lighten the row when
     * the match is completed and the consumer wants to de-emphasize
     * the losing side.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    isLoser?: boolean
    /**
     * Toggle the score column.
     *
     * @default true
     */
    showScore?: boolean
    /**
     * Toggle the seed prefix.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    showSeed?: boolean
    /**
     * Whether the row advertises interactivity (hover state, cursor).
     *
     * @default true
     */
    interactive?: boolean
    /**
     * Head-start carried into the match by this competitor, in rounds /
     * sets. When set (`> 0`), a `+N` badge is rendered next to the name
     * — used for the Winner Bracket champion's Grand Final advantage.
     */
    advantageRounds?: number
    /**
     * Marks this competitor as the one that FORFEITED the match — the
     * name is struck through and a "forfeit" tag is shown.
     */
    forfeit?: boolean
}

props.name: competitor
props.description_fallback: The competitor payload. null renders a "TBD" placeholder for undetermined participants.

props.name: score
props.description_fallback: Optional score — accepts string for non-numeric markers.

props.name: isWinner
props.description_fallback: Applies the --winner modifier class (bolder text, intent-tinted background).

props.name: isLoser
props.description_fallback: Marks the losing side — used to lighten the row when the match is completed.

props.name: showScore
props.description_fallback: Toggle the score column.

props.name: showSeed
props.description_fallback: Toggle the seed prefix.

props.name: interactive
props.description_fallback: Whether the row advertises interactivity (hover state, cursor).

props.name: advantageRounds
props.description_fallback: Head-start in rounds/sets — renders a +N badge next to the name (Grand Final advantage).

props.name: forfeit
props.description_fallback: Marks this competitor as having forfeited — name is struck through and a "forfeit" tag is shown.

examples.title_fallback: Standalone competitor row
examples.code:
<OrigamBracketCompetitor
  :competitor="{ id: 1, name: 'Team Liquid', seed: 1 }"
  :score="3"
  :is-winner="true"
  show-seed
/>

entry.name: IBracketMatch
entry.description_fallback: A single match between two competitors. competitorA/B are nullable so the bracket can render "TBD" placeholders. scoreA/B accept string for non-numeric markers. nextMatchId lets OrigamBracket draw connectors automatically.

props.name: id
props.description_fallback: Stable identifier — required for connector linking.

props.name: competitorA
props.description_fallback: Left-side / top-side competitor. null = TBD or bye.

props.name: competitorB
props.description_fallback: Right-side / bottom-side competitor. null = TBD or bye.

props.name: scoreA
props.description_fallback: Score of competitorA. Accepts string for non-numeric markers.

props.name: scoreB
props.description_fallback: Score of competitorB. Accepts string for non-numeric markers.

props.name: winnerId
props.description_fallback: Identifier of the declared winner. Used to apply the --winner modifier class.

props.name: status
props.description_fallback: Optional lifecycle marker. Drives the visual --status-{value} modifier on the match card.

props.name: nextMatchId
props.description_fallback: Optional id of the downstream match this one feeds into — used by the connector layout.

props.name: advantage
props.description_fallback: Optional head-start for one competitor (double-elimination Grand Final advantage).

props.name: scheduledAt
props.description_fallback: ISO date string — informative only, displayed when present.

props.name: metadata
props.description_fallback: Free-form payload — never read by the component.

examples.title_fallback: Defining a completed match
examples.code:
import type { IBracketMatch } from 'origam'

const match: IBracketMatch = {
    id: 'sf-1',
    competitorA: { id: 'tl', name: 'Team Liquid' },
    competitorB: { id: 'c9', name: 'Cloud9' },
    scoreA: 3,
    scoreB: 1,
    winnerId: 'tl',
    status: 'completed',
    nextMatchId: 'final',
}

entry.name: IBracketMatchAdvantage
entry.description_fallback: Head-start carried into a match by one competitor — the classic double-elimination Grand Final advantage, where the Winner Bracket champion starts already up by one round/set.

props.name: competitorId
props.description_fallback: Id of the competitor that starts ahead.

props.name: rounds

entry.name: IBracketMatchProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamBracketMatch> — a single match card rendered inside <OrigamBracket>. Carries the full cross-cutting surface and can be rendered standalone on a match-details page.
entry.definition:
export interface IBracketMatchProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IHoverProps, IActiveProps, IRoundedProps, IElevationProps, IBorderProps, IDensityProps, IDimensionProps, IPaddingProps, IMarginProps {
    /** The match payload to render. */
    match: IBracketMatch
    /**
     * Override of the per-match status — useful when the caller wants
     * to force a status (e.g. preview a "live" badge from a story).
     */
    status?: TBracketMatchStatus
    /**
     * Destination of the "Watch live" link, shown in the meta header only
     * when the match is `live`. A URL (rendered as an `<a>` opening in a
     * new tab). Omit to hide the link.
     */
    to?: string
    /**
     * Hoists the match into the "final" visual treatment — bigger
     * card, shadow, and rounded corners.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    isFinal?: boolean
    /**
     * Hides the score column when `false`.
     *
     * @default true
     */
    showScores?: boolean
    /**
     * Shows the seed prefix on competitor names.
     *
     * @default false
     */
    showSeed?: boolean
    /**
     * Whether the card advertises interactivity (hover state, cursor,
     * keyboard focus, `role="button"`).
     *
     * @default true
     */
    interactive?: boolean
}

props.name: match
props.description_fallback: The match payload to render.

props.name: status
props.description_fallback: Override of the per-match status — useful to force a status from a story or preview.

props.name: to
props.description_fallback: Destination of the "Watch live" link, shown only when the match is live.

props.name: isFinal
props.description_fallback: Hoists the match into the "final" visual treatment — bigger card, shadow, and rounded corners.

props.name: showScores
props.description_fallback: Hides the score column when false.

props.name: showSeed
props.description_fallback: Shows the seed prefix on competitor names.

entry.name: IBracketProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamBracket> — a tournament tree renderer supporting single-elimination, double-elimination and round-robin layouts. Purely presentational: accepts immutable rounds and emits interaction events.
entry.definition:
export interface IBracketProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IDensityProps, IRoundedProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IBorderProps, IDimensionProps, IElevationProps, IMarginProps, IPaddingProps, ITypographyProps { /** * Required. Pre-ordered list of rounds. For single-elimination, * the rounds are laid out from earliest (e.g. round-of-16) to * final. For double-elimination, segregate by `IBracketRound.side` * (`'winner'`, `'loser'`, `'grand-final'`). */ rounds: IBracketRound[] /** * Tournament shape. Single-elimination is the default. * Round-robin renders a NxN matrix instead of a tree. * * @default 'single-elimination' */ variant?: TBracketVariant /** * Layout axis. Horizontal stacks rounds as columns (the classic * tournament tree look). Vertical stacks rounds as rows — useful * for narrow viewports. Ignored when `variant === 'round-robin'` * (the matrix layout has its own grid axis). * * @default 'horizontal' */ direction?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' /** * Toggle round headers (`

Quarter-finals

`). * * @default true */ showRoundTitles?: boolean /** * Toggle the score column on each competitor row. * * @default true */ showScores?: boolean /** * Toggle the seed prefix on competitor names (e.g. `1. Team Liquid`). * * @default false */ showSeed?: boolean /** * Whether match cards should be interactive (cursor, hover state, * keyboard focus). When `false`, click handlers still fire but the * cards do not advertise affordance. * * @default true */ interactive?: boolean /** * Heading shown above the winner-bracket tree in a * double-elimination layout. Pre-translate before passing — the * component never calls `useT`. * * @default 'Winners bracket' */ winnersLabel?: string /** * Heading shown above the loser-bracket tree in a * double-elimination layout. * * @default 'Losers bracket' */ losersLabel?: string }

props.name: rounds
props.description_fallback: Required. Pre-ordered list of rounds — from earliest (round-of-16) to final for single-elimination.

props.name: variant
props.description_fallback: Tournament shape. Round-robin renders a NxN matrix instead of a tree.

props.name: direction
props.description_fallback: Layout axis. Horizontal stacks rounds as columns. Vertical stacks rounds as rows.

props.name: showRoundTitles
props.description_fallback: Toggle round headers.

props.name: showScores
props.description_fallback: Toggle the score column on each competitor row.

props.name: showSeed
props.description_fallback: Toggle the seed prefix on competitor names.

props.name: interactive
props.description_fallback: Whether match cards should be interactive (cursor, hover, keyboard focus).

props.name: winnersLabel
props.description_fallback: Heading shown above the winner-bracket tree in a double-elimination layout.

props.name: losersLabel
props.description_fallback: Heading shown above the loser-bracket tree in a double-elimination layout.

examples.title_fallback: Single-elimination bracket
examples.code:

entry.name: ICalendarComponentProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamCalendar> — a full-featured calendar with month/week/day/agenda views, event management, drag-select, recurring event expansion, locale support, and the full origam cross-cutting surface.
entry.definition:
export interface ICalendarComponentProps
    extends ICommonsComponentProps,
        IColorProps,
        IBgColorProps,
        IRoundedProps,
        IElevationProps,
        IBorderProps,
        IDensityProps,
        IDimensionProps,
        IPaddingProps,
        IMarginProps {
    /** Active view mode. v-model:view. */
    view?: TCalendarView
    /** Anchor date. v-model:currentDate. */
    currentDate?: Date | string
    /** Event list. Recurring events are expanded internally. */
    events?: Array<IEvent>
    /**
     * First weekday rendered as the leftmost column. `1` (Monday) for
     * EU/ISO, `0` (Sunday) for US. Default `1`.
     */
    firstDayOfWeek?: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6
    /** Clock format for time labels. Default `'24h'`. */
    timeFormat?: TCalendarTimeFormat
    /** BCP 47 locale tag — drives weekday / month names. */
    locale?: string
    /** Enable drag-select on the grid. Default `true`. */
    selectable?: boolean
    /**
     * Which property of `IEvent` to read for colouring. Default
     * `'category'`. Setting to `'color'` makes the calendar use the
     * direct override exclusively.
     */
    eventColorKey?: 'category' | 'color' | string
    /**
     * Map category string → intent / CSS colour. Skip the prop to
     * fall back to the neutral surface for all categories.
     */
    categoryColors?: Record<string, TIntent | string>
    /** Tint Saturday + Sunday in month / week views. Default `true`. */
    weekendHighlight?: boolean
    /**
     * Render a leading ISO week-number column. Useful for project /
     * billing calendars. Default `false`.
     */
    showWeekNumbers?: boolean
    /** First hour rendered in week / day views. Default `0`. */
    dayStartHour?: number
    /** Last hour rendered in week / day views. Default `24`. */
    dayEndHour?: number
    /**
     * Minutes per row in the timeline. `30` for half-hour granularity
     * (default), `15` for fine-grained drag-create, `60` for compact.
     */
    slotDuration?: number
    /** Lower navigation bound. The toolbar disables `<` past this. */
    minDate?: Date | string
    /** Upper navigation bound. The toolbar disables `>` past this. */
    maxDate?: Date | string
    /**
     * Cells to grey out. Accepts an array (Dates or ISO strings) or a
     * predicate when the disabling rule is too dynamic to enumerate.
     */
    disabledDates?: Array<Date | string> | ((d: Date) => boolean)
}

props.name: view
props.description_fallback: Active view mode. Two-way binding via v-model:view.

props.name: currentDate
props.description_fallback: Anchor date. Two-way binding via v-model:currentDate.

props.name: events
props.description_fallback: Event list. Recurring events are expanded internally.

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description_fallback: First weekday rendered as the leftmost column. 1 (Monday) for EU/ISO, 0 (Sunday) for US.

props.name: timeFormat
props.description_fallback: Clock format for time labels.

props.name: locale
props.description_fallback: BCP 47 locale tag — drives weekday and month names.

props.name: selectable
props.description_fallback: Enable drag-select on the grid.

props.name: eventColorKey
props.description_fallback: Which property of IEvent to read for colouring.

props.name: categoryColors
props.description_fallback: Map category string → intent / CSS colour.

props.name: weekendHighlight
props.description_fallback: Tint Saturday + Sunday in month/week views.

props.name: showWeekNumbers
props.description_fallback: Render a leading ISO week-number column.

props.name: dayStartHour
props.description_fallback: First hour rendered in week/day views.

props.name: dayEndHour
props.description_fallback: Last hour rendered in week/day views.

props.name: slotDuration
props.description_fallback: Minutes per row in the timeline. 30 for half-hour granularity, 15 for fine-grained drag-create, 60 for compact.

props.name: minDate
props.description_fallback: Lower navigation bound. The toolbar disables < past this.

props.name: maxDate
props.description_fallback: Upper navigation bound. The toolbar disables > past this.

entry.name: ICalendarEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emit signatures fired by OrigamCalendar — covers v-model sync (view, currentDate), user interaction (event-click, date-click, range-select, create-event-request) and navigation signals (view-change, navigate).
entry.definition:
export interface ICalendarEmits {
    (e: 'update:view', view: TCalendarView): void
    (e: 'update:currentDate', date: Date): void
    (e: 'event-click', event: IEvent, originalDOMEvent: MouseEvent): void
    (e: 'date-click', date: Date): void
    (e: 'range-select', start: Date, end: Date): void
    (e: 'create-event-request', start: Date, end: Date): void
    (e: 'view-change', view: TCalendarView): void
    (e: 'navigate', direction: TCalendarNavigate): void
}

    v-model:view="view"
    v-model:current-date="currentDate"
    @event-click="onEventClick"

/>

entry.name: ICalendarSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures exposed by OrigamCalendar. The default toolbar can be replaced wholesale via #header, individual events via #event, day cells via #day, day column headers via #dayHeader, and empty-agenda state via #empty.
entry.definition:
export interface ICalendarSlots {
    header?: (bindings: ICalendarHeaderSlotBindings) => any
    event?: (bindings: ICalendarEventSlotBindings) => any
    day?: (bindings: ICalendarDaySlotBindings) => any
    dayHeader?: (bindings: { date: Date }) => any
    empty?: (bindings: { view: TCalendarView }) => any
}

props.name: header
props.description_fallback: Full toolbar replacement. Receives view, title, canPrev, canNext, navigate and setView.

props.name: event
props.description_fallback: Custom event chip renderer. Receives the IEvent object plus isPast and isToday context flags.

props.name: day
props.description_fallback: Custom day cell renderer (month view). Receives date, events array, isToday, isPast, isOutside, isWeekend, isDisabled.

props.name: dayHeader
props.description_fallback: Custom day column header (week / day views). Receives the column Date.

props.name: empty
props.description_fallback: Rendered in agenda view when no events are present for the current period.

    @click:append="onClose"
/>

entry.name: ICardHeaderProps

entry.name: ICardProps
entry.description_fallback: Full prop surface for OrigamCard — extends the entire cross-cutting DS commons (tag, color, bgColor, border, density, dimension, elevation, loader, location, position, rounded, margin, padding, link, ripple, adjacent, active) plus card-specific props (disabled, flat, hover, image, link, subtitle, text, title, type).
entry.definition:
export interface ICardProps extends ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IBorderProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IDensityProps, IDimensionProps, IElevationProps, ILoaderProps, ILocationProps, IPositionProps, IRoundedProps, IMarginProps, IPaddingProps, ILinkProps, IRippleProps, IAdjacentProps, IActiveProps {
    disabled?: boolean
    flat?: boolean
    hover?: boolean
    image?: string
    link?: boolean
    subtitle?: string | number
    text?: string | number
    title?: string | number
    type?: TCardType
}

props.name: disabled
props.description_fallback: Puts the card in a disabled state — mutes pointer events and reduces visual opacity.

props.name: flat
props.description_fallback: Removes the elevation shadow, rendering the card flush with its container.

props.name: hover
props.description_fallback: Force-enables the hover visual state (shadow lift + cursor pointer) without waiting for pointer entry.

props.name: image
props.description_fallback: URL of an image rendered as the card background.

props.name: link
props.description_fallback: Renders the card as a navigable link surface (adds cursor pointer and focuses via href/to).

props.name: subtitle
props.description_fallback: Secondary text line rendered below the title in the built-in header.

props.name: text
props.description_fallback: Body text rendered inside the built-in card text area.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Headline text rendered in the built-in card header.

props.name: type
props.description_fallback: Card type variant — controls layout and semantic role (e.g. outlined, tonal, elevated).

examples.title_fallback: Feature card with color, elevation and image
examples.code:
<OrigamCard
    title="Workspace Pro"
    subtitle="Unlimited seats"
    text="Everything your team needs to ship faster."
    image="/img/workspace.webp"
    elevation="md"
    rounded="lg"
    color="primary"
    hover
/>

entry.name: ICardTextProps

props.name: text

examples.title_fallback: OrigamCardText with padding override
examples.code:
<OrigamCard>
    <OrigamCardHeader title="Release Notes" />
    <OrigamCardText padding="6" text="Version 3.0 ships today." />
</OrigamCard>
