entry.name: ICarouselProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for OrigamCarousel — extends IWindowProps (slide management), IColorProps, IBgColorProps, IDimensionProps, IHoverProps, IActiveProps, ICommonsComponentProps and ITagProps, with carousel-specific controls for auto-cycle, delimiter icons and progress bar.
entry.definition:
export interface ICarouselProps extends IWindowProps, IColorProps, IBgColorProps, ICommonsComponentProps, ITagProps, IDimensionProps, IHoverProps, IActiveProps {
    cycle?: boolean
    delimiterIcon?: TIcon
    hideDelimiters?: boolean
    hideDelimiterBackground?: boolean
    interval?: number | string
    progress?: boolean
    verticalDelimiters?: boolean | TInline
}

props.name: cycle
props.description_fallback: Automatically advance slides on a timer.

props.name: delimiterIcon
props.description_fallback: Icon rendered for each slide delimiter dot.

props.name: hideDelimiters
props.description_fallback: Hide the slide position delimiter dots.

props.name: hideDelimiterBackground
props.description_fallback: Remove the translucent background behind the delimiter dots.

props.name: interval
props.description_fallback: Auto-cycle interval in milliseconds. Only effective when cycle is true. Default 6000.

props.name: progress
props.description_fallback: Show a thin linear progress bar below the carousel that tracks cycle countdown.

props.name: verticalDelimiters
props.description_fallback: Render delimiter dots on the left or right side instead of at the bottom.

examples.title_fallback: Auto-cycling carousel with progress bar
examples.code:
<OrigamCarousel
    cycle
    :interval="4000"
    progress
    height="400"
    color="primary"
>
    <OrigamCarouselItem src="/img/slide-1.webp" cover />
    <OrigamCarouselItem src="/img/slide-2.webp" cover />
</OrigamCarousel>

entry.name: IChartAnnotation
entry.description_fallback: A single overlay annotation drawn on top of a cartesian chart SVG surface. Supports four kinds: arrow, label, circle and bracket. Positioned in data coordinates and projected to pixel space by the chart X/Y scales.

props.name: kind
props.description_fallback: Annotation kind. arrow = directed line with arrowhead; label = callout box; circle = stroked circle; bracket = horizontal or L-shaped span.

props.name: x
props.description_fallback: Source / anchor X coordinate in data space (category string or numeric index).

props.name: y
props.description_fallback: Source / anchor Y coordinate in data space.

props.name: x2
props.description_fallback: End-point X in data space. Required for arrow (head position) and bracket (right edge).

props.name: y2
props.description_fallback: End-point Y in data space. Optional for bracket — when omitted the bracket stays horizontal.

props.name: text
props.description_fallback: Text content rendered alongside the annotation.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Stroke / fill colour — accepts a TIntent name or any CSS colour string.

props.name: width
props.description_fallback: Stroke width in SVG units. Default 1.5.

props.name: radius
props.description_fallback: Circle radius in SVG units. Applies to the circle kind only. Default 12.

props.name: dx
props.description_fallback: Horizontal offset of the text label relative to its anchor point in SVG units. Default 0.

props.name: dy
props.description_fallback: Vertical offset of the text label relative to its anchor point in SVG units. Default -14.

examples.title_fallback: Annotating a chart data point with an arrow
examples.code:
const annotations: IChartAnnotation[] = [
    {
        kind: 'arrow',
        x: 'Mar',
        y: 120,
        x2: 'Mar',
        y2: 200,
        text: 'Peak month',
        color: 'danger',
    },
]

<OrigamChartCartesian :series="series" :annotations="annotations" />

entry.name: IChartAnnotationGeo
entry.description_fallback: Resolved SVG geometry for one chart annotation. Produced by computeAnnotationGeometry in chart.composable.ts and consumed directly by OrigamChartCartesian for rendering. Fields are gated per kind.

props.name: kind
props.description_fallback: Annotation kind — mirrors the kind declared on IChartAnnotation.

props.name: stroke
props.description_fallback: Resolved CSS colour string for the annotation stroke and fill.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description_fallback: Resolved stroke width in SVG units.

props.name: ax
props.description_fallback: Anchor pixel X coordinate (tail of arrow / anchor of label / centre of circle / left edge of bracket).

props.name: ay
props.description_fallback: Anchor pixel Y coordinate.

props.name: bx
props.description_fallback: End pixel X coordinate (head of arrow / right edge of bracket). Equals ax when unused.

props.name: by
props.description_fallback: End pixel Y coordinate. Equals ay when unused.

props.name: arrowPoints
props.description_fallback: Arrowhead polygon points attribute — populated for kind === arrow.

props.name: text
props.description_fallback: Text content to display alongside the annotation.

props.name: dx
props.description_fallback: Resolved horizontal text offset in SVG units.

props.name: dy
props.description_fallback: Resolved vertical text offset in SVG units.

props.name: radius
props.description_fallback: Circle radius in SVG units — populated for kind === circle.

props.name: callout
props.type_label: { x: number, y: number, width: number, height: number }
props.description_fallback: Callout rounded-rect geometry — populated for kind === label.

props.name: leaderEnd
props.description_fallback: Bottom-centre of the callout box where the leader line terminates — populated for kind === label.

examples.title_fallback: IChartAnnotationGeo is an internal type — consumed by the chart renderer

entry.name: IChartAxisProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for OrigamChartAxis — the cartesian-only axes, grid and tick-labels block. Expects pre-computed tick arrays and plot corners from useChart and paints them. No data coupling.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartAxisProps {
    /**
     * Pixel coordinates of the plotting area's four corners.
     * Comes verbatim from `useChart().plot.value`.
     */
    plot: {
        x0: number
        y0: number
        x1: number
        y1: number
        cx: number
        cy: number
    }
    /** Tick descriptors for X + Y (primary left axis). Comes from `useChart().ticks.value`. */
    ticks: {
        x: Array<IChartTick>
        y: Array<IChartTick>
    }
    /**
     * Tick descriptors for the secondary right Y axis.
     * When provided, a second vertical axis is rendered on the
     * right edge of the plot area. Comes from
     * `useChart().secondaryTicks.value`.
     */
    secondaryYTicks?: Array<IChartTick>
    /**
     * Render the four-corner axis frame + tick labels. When `false`,
     * the component renders nothing (mirrors the legacy `showAxis`
     * prop on `<OrigamChart>`).
     */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * Render horizontal grid lines under the plot. When `false`,
     * no grid is drawn (mirrors the legacy `showGrid` prop).
     */
    showGrid?: boolean
    /**
     * Formatter applied to X-axis tick labels. Defaults to
     * `String(value)`.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Formatter applied to Y-axis tick labels. Defaults to
     * `String(value)`.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
    /**
     * Formatter applied to the secondary (right) Y-axis tick labels.
     * Falls back to `yAxisFormat`, then `String(value)`.
     */
    secondaryYAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: plot
props.type_label:
{
        x0: number
        y0: number
        x1: number
        y1: number
        cx: number
        cy: number
    }
props.description_fallback: Pixel coordinates of the plotting area four corners. Comes verbatim from useChart().plot.value.

props.name: ticks
props.description_fallback: Tick descriptors for X and Y primary left axis. Comes from useChart().ticks.value.

props.name: secondaryYTicks
props.description_fallback: Tick descriptors for the secondary right Y axis. When provided a second vertical axis is rendered on the right edge of the plot area.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render the four-corner axis frame and tick labels. When false the component renders nothing.

props.name: showGrid
props.description_fallback: Render horizontal grid lines under the plot.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to X-axis tick labels. Defaults to String(value).

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to Y-axis tick labels. Defaults to String(value).

props.name: secondaryYAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the secondary right Y-axis tick labels. Falls back to yAxisFormat, then String(value).

examples.title_fallback: OrigamChartAxis is used internally by cartesian chart families

entry.name: IChartBaseEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emit signatures shared across every per-type chart component (ChartBar, ChartLine, ChartPie, …). Covers data-point click, legend-entry click and legend visibility toggle.

examples.title_fallback: Listening to chart data point and legend events
examples.code:
<OrigamChartBar
    :series="series"
    @point-click="onPointClick"
    @legend-click="onLegendClick"
    @series-toggle="onSeriesToggle"
/>

entry.name: IChartBaseProps
entry.description_fallback: Props shared across every origam chart type — extends ICommonsComponentProps, IDimensionProps, IMarginProps, IPaddingProps, IRoundedProps, IElevationProps and IBgColorProps. Covers series data, legend, tooltip, animation, color scheme and aspect ratio.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartBaseProps
    extends ICommonsComponentProps,
        IDimensionProps,
        IMarginProps,
        IPaddingProps,
        IRoundedProps,
        IElevationProps,
        IBgColorProps,
        Pick<ITypographyProps, 'fontSize' | 'fontWeight'> {
    /** Data series — one or more. Empty array renders the `#empty` slot. */
    series: Array<IChartSeries>
    /**
     * X axis labels (for line/area/bar/column/radar). Length should
     * match the longest series; missing entries fall back to the
     * numeric index. Ignored for pie / donut / scatter.
     */
    categories?: Array<string>
    /** Optional title rendered above the plotting area. */
    title?: string
    /** Optional subtitle rendered below the title. */
    subtitle?: string
    /** Toggle the legend block. Default `true`. */
    showLegend?: boolean
    /** Anchor of the legend block. Default `'bottom'`. */
    legendPosition?: TChartLegendPosition
    /** Toggle the hover tooltip. Default `true`. */
    showTooltip?: boolean
    /**
     * Animate paths / bars / slices on first paint and on data
     * changes. Respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. Default `true`.
     */
    animated?: boolean
    /** Animation duration in ms. Default `600`. */
    animationDuration?: number
    /**
     * Palette used when a series does not pin its own `color`.
     * Pass intent strings (cycled in order) or raw CSS colours.
     * Default cycles through the 8 origam intents.
     */
    colorScheme?: Array<TIntent | string>
    /**
     * CSS `aspect-ratio` shortcut (`'16/9'`, `'4/3'`, `'1/1'`…). When
     * set, overrides `height` and lets the chart breathe with the
     * container width.
     */
    aspectRatio?: string
}

props.name: series
props.description_fallback: Data series — one or more. An empty array renders the #empty slot.

props.name: categories
props.description_fallback: X axis labels (for line/area/bar/column/radar). Length should match the longest series; missing entries fall back to the numeric index. Ignored for pie/donut/scatter.

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Optional title rendered above the plotting area.

props.name: subtitle
props.description_fallback: Optional subtitle rendered below the title.

props.name: showLegend
props.description_fallback: Toggle the legend block. Default true.

props.name: legendPosition
props.description_fallback: Anchor of the legend block. Default bottom.

props.name: showTooltip
props.description_fallback: Toggle the hover tooltip. Default true.

props.name: animated
props.description_fallback: Animate paths/bars/slices on first paint and on data changes. Respects prefers-reduced-motion. Default true.

props.name: animationDuration
props.description_fallback: Animation duration in ms. Default 600.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description_fallback: Palette used when a series does not pin its own color. Accepts intent strings or raw CSS colours. Default cycles through the 8 origam intents.

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description_fallback: CSS aspect-ratio shortcut ('16/9', '4/3', '1/1'). When set, overrides height and lets the chart breathe with the container width.

examples.title_fallback: Bar chart using the shared base props
examples.code:
<OrigamChartBar
    :series="[{ name: 'Revenue', data: [120, 200, 150, 80] }]"
    :categories="['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4']"
    title="Quarterly Revenue"
    aspect-ratio="16/9"
    :animation-duration="400"
    :color-scheme="['primary', 'success']"
/>

entry.name: IChartBaseSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures shared across every per-type chart component. Covers tooltip body replacement, legend entry replacement, title block replacement and empty state.

props.name: tooltip
props.description_fallback: Replace the default tooltip body. Receives the hovered IChartPoint, its IChartSeries and the category label.

props.name: 'legend-item'
props.type_label: (bindings: { series: IChartSeries, index: number, visible: boolean }) => any

props.name: title
props.description_fallback: Replace the title block (title + subtitle) rendered above the plotting area.

props.name: empty
props.description_fallback: Rendered when series is empty or every series is hidden.

entry.name: IChartBoxPlotBox
entry.description_fallback: Internal box descriptor produced by the OrigamChartBoxPlot geometry engine for each category slot. All coordinates are in SVG-space pixels. Consumed directly by the SVG renderer and exposed through the #tooltip slot.

props.name: index
props.description_fallback: Category index (position in the data array).

props.name: category
props.description_fallback: Category label.

props.name: stats
props.type_label:
{
		min: number
		q1: number
		median: number
		q3: number
		max: number
	}
props.description_fallback: Resolved five-number summary already coerced to SVG Y coords.

props.name: rawStats
props.type_label:
{
		min: number
		q1: number
		median: number
		q3: number
		max: number
	}
props.description_fallback: Raw numeric five-number summary in data-space values.

props.name: iqr
props.description_fallback: IQR = Q3 − Q1 in data space.

props.name: svgQ3
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinate for Q3 (top of box rect).

props.name: svgQ1
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinate for Q1 (bottom of box rect).

props.name: svgMedian
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinate for the median line.

props.name: svgMax
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinate for the upper whisker tip.

props.name: svgMin
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinate for the lower whisker tip.

props.name: boxHeight
props.description_fallback: Pre-computed box rectangle height (|svgQ1 − svgQ3|) to avoid template-level Math.abs().

props.name: cx
props.description_fallback: SVG X centre of the slot.

props.name: halfBoxW
props.description_fallback: Half-width of the box rectangle.

props.name: halfCapW
props.description_fallback: Half-width of the whisker cap segment.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Resolved CSS colour string for this box.

props.name: outliers
props.description_fallback: SVG Y coordinates and raw values of each outlier dot.

props.name: visible
props.description_fallback: Whether this box is currently visible after legend toggle.

examples.title_fallback: Accessing IChartBoxPlotBox in the #tooltip slot

entry.name: IChartBoxPlotDatum
entry.description_fallback: Pre-aggregated datum for OrigamChartBoxPlot — the consumer supplies all five-number-summary values (min, q1, median, q3, max) and optional outlier array directly. Use IChartBoxPlotRawDatum when raw samples should be aggregated by the component.

props.name: category
props.description_fallback: Category label shown on the X axis.

props.name: min
props.description_fallback: Minimum (lower fence or true min when no outliers).

props.name: q1
props.description_fallback: First quartile — Q1 (25th percentile).

props.name: median
props.description_fallback: Median — Q2 (50th percentile).

props.name: q3
props.description_fallback: Third quartile — Q3 (75th percentile).

props.name: max
props.description_fallback: Maximum (upper fence or true max when no outliers).

props.name: outliers
props.description_fallback: Values lying outside the 1.5·IQR whisker fences.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Override colour for this datum. Intent token or raw CSS colour. When absent the category index cycles through colorScheme.

examples.title_fallback: Pre-aggregated box plot data
examples.code:
import type { IChartBoxPlotDatum } from 'origam'

const data: IChartBoxPlotDatum[] = [
    { category: 'Group A', min: 10, q1: 25, median: 40, q3: 60, max: 80, outliers: [5, 95] },
    { category: 'Group B', min: 20, q1: 35, median: 50, q3: 70, max: 90, color: 'success' },
]

entry.name: IChartBoxPlotProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for OrigamChartBoxPlot — extends IChartBaseProps with box-plot-specific controls: category order, box width, whisker cap width, outlier visibility, axis/grid visibility, Y-axis range overrides and axis label formatters.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartBoxPlotProps extends IChartBaseProps {
	/**
	 * Explicit category order. When absent the order is inferred from
	 * the first occurrence of each category in `series[0].data`.
	 */
	categories?: Array<string>
	/**
	 * Box width as a fraction of the per-category slot width.
	 * Range [0, 1]. Default `0.6`.
	 */
	boxWidth?: number
	/**
	 * Whisker cap width as a fraction of the per-category slot width.
	 * Range [0, 1]. Default `0.4`.
	 */
	whiskerCapWidth?: number
	/** Render outlier dots beyond the whisker fences. Default `true`. */
	showOutliers?: boolean
	/** Render X and Y axes. Default `true`. */
	showAxis?: boolean
	/** Render horizontal grid lines. Default `true`. */
	showGrid?: boolean
	/**
	 * Override the auto-computed Y-axis minimum.
	 * When absent the component uses `min(data) − 10 %` padding.
	 */
	yMin?: number
	/**
	 * Override the auto-computed Y-axis maximum.
	 * When absent the component uses `max(data) + 10 %` padding.
	 */
	yMax?: number
	/**
	 * Formatter applied to X-axis category labels.
	 * Default: identity (category string returned as-is).
	 */
	xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
	/**
	 * Formatter applied to Y-axis tick values.
	 * Default: `String(value)`.
	 */
	yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: categories
props.description_fallback: Explicit category order. When absent the order is inferred from the first occurrence of each category in series[0].data.

props.name: boxWidth
props.description_fallback: Box width as a fraction of the per-category slot width. Range [0, 1]. Default 0.6.

props.name: whiskerCapWidth
props.description_fallback: Whisker cap width as a fraction of the per-category slot width. Range [0, 1]. Default 0.4.

props.name: showOutliers
props.description_fallback: Render outlier dots beyond the whisker fences. Default true.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render X and Y axes. Default true.

props.name: showGrid
props.description_fallback: Render horizontal grid lines. Default true.

props.name: yMin
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y-axis minimum. When absent the component uses min(data) − 10% padding.

props.name: yMax
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y-axis maximum. When absent the component uses max(data) + 10% padding.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to X-axis category labels. Default: identity (category string returned as-is).

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to Y-axis tick values. Default: String(value).

examples.title_fallback: Box plot with custom box width and Y-axis formatter
examples.code:
<OrigamChartBoxPlot
    :series="series"
    :categories="['Control', 'Treatment A', 'Treatment B']"
    :box-width="0.5"
    :whisker-cap-width="0.3"
    show-outliers
    :y-axis-format="(v) => v + ' ms'"
    aspect-ratio="4/3"
/>

entry.name: IChartBoxPlotRawDatum
entry.description_fallback: Raw-samples datum for OrigamChartBoxPlot — the component derives the five-number summary via Tukey's method (linear interpolation) and detects outliers at the 1.5·IQR fence automatically. Use IChartBoxPlotDatum when the aggregation has already been done.

props.name: category
props.description_fallback: Category label shown on the X axis.

props.name: samples
props.description_fallback: Array of individual observations. Must contain at least 4 values for meaningful quartile computation. Fewer values are handled gracefully: all map to the same min/q1/median/q3/max.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Override colour for this datum. Intent token or raw CSS colour. When absent the category index cycles through colorScheme.

examples.title_fallback: Passing raw sample arrays — let the component compute quartiles

entry.name: IChartBoxPlotSlots
entry.description_fallback: Slot signatures exposed by <OrigamChartBoxPlot>. Extends IChartBaseSlots with an enriched tooltip slot that receives the full five-number summary and box geometry descriptor.

props.name: tooltip
props.description_fallback: Override the default tooltip card. Receives point (carries x = category, y = median), series, category, and the extended box descriptor with the full five-number summary.

examples.title_fallback: Custom tooltip slot on a box-plot chart

entry.name: IChartBulletBullet
entry.description_fallback: Pre-computed geometry descriptor for a single bullet in a bullet chart. Produced by the bullet layout engine inside OrigamChartBullet — contains resolved colours, slot coordinates, and the maximum axis value.

props.name: index
props.description_fallback: Position of this bullet in the original series array.

props.name: category
props.description_fallback: Category label from categories[index] or series[index].name.

props.name: datum
props.description_fallback: Raw datum ({value, target, ranges}).

props.name: visible
props.description_fallback: Whether this bullet is currently visible (legend toggle).

props.name: barFill
props.description_fallback: Resolved fill colour for the actual-value bar.

props.name: targetStroke
props.description_fallback: Resolved stroke colour for the target tick.

props.name: rangeFills
props.description_fallback: Resolved fills for each range band, parallel to datum.ranges.

props.name: slotX
props.description_fallback: SVG x of the bullet slot origin (horizontal: left edge; vertical: top edge).

props.name: slotY
props.description_fallback: SVG y of the bullet slot origin.

props.name: slotW
props.description_fallback: Total slot width (horizontal: plot width; vertical: slot column width).

props.name: slotH
props.description_fallback: Total slot height (horizontal: slot row height; vertical: plot height).

props.name: maxRange
props.description_fallback: Maximum axis value = max(ranges[-1].to, target, value).

entry.name: IChartBulletDatum
entry.description_fallback: Bullet data payload for a single series entry in a bullet chart. Combines the actual value, the target / goal value, and the qualitative range bands that form the background.

props.name: value
props.description_fallback: Actual (measured) value. Drives the solid foreground bar.

props.name: target
props.description_fallback: Target / goal value. Rendered as a thin cross-tick.

props.name: ranges
props.description_fallback: Qualitative range bands rendered behind the bars. At least one band is required; three is the Stephen Few recommendation (poor / acceptable / good).

entry.name: IChartBulletProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartBullet> — the bullet / KPI chart family. Each series entry renders one bullet combining range bands, an actual-value bar, and a target marker tick (Stephen Few design).
entry.definition:
export interface IChartBulletProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Category labels — one per series entry. Rendered beside each
     * bullet. Falls back to `series[i].name` when omitted.
     */
    categories?: Array<string>
    /**
     * Fill colour for the actual-value bar. Accepts a TIntent token or
     * a raw CSS colour. Default `'primary'`.
     */
    barColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Stroke colour for the target marker tick. Default `'danger'`.
     */
    targetColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Fallback palette used when `range.color` is omitted. Cycled in
     * array order across bands. Default `['danger', 'warning', 'success']`.
     */
    rangeColors?: Array<TIntent | string>
    /**
     * Layout direction. `'horizontal'` renders bullets as rows (label
     * left, bar extending right). `'vertical'` renders bullets as
     * columns (label below, bar extending upward). Default
     * `'horizontal'`.
     */
    orientation?: TChartBulletOrientation
    /**
     * Thickness of the actual-value bar as a fraction of the slot
     * height (horizontal) or slot width (vertical). Range [0, 1].
     * Default `0.45`.
     */
    barThickness?: number
    /**
     * Show the quantitative axis. Default `true`.
     */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * X-axis tick formatter — applied to axis tick labels.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Y-axis tick formatter — applied to axis tick labels (vertical
     * orientation).
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: categories
props.description_fallback: Category labels — one per series entry. Rendered beside each bullet. Falls back to series[i].name when omitted.

props.name: barColor
props.description_fallback: Fill colour for the actual-value bar. Accepts a TIntent token or a raw CSS colour. Default 'primary'.

props.name: targetColor
props.description_fallback: Stroke colour for the target marker tick. Default 'danger'.

props.name: rangeColors
props.description_fallback: Fallback palette used when range.color is omitted. Cycled in array order across bands.

props.name: orientation
props.description_fallback: Layout direction. 'horizontal' renders bullets as rows; 'vertical' renders bullets as columns. Default 'horizontal'.

props.name: barThickness
props.description_fallback: Thickness of the actual-value bar as a fraction of the slot height (horizontal) or slot width (vertical). Range [0, 1].

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Show the quantitative axis. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: X-axis tick formatter applied to axis tick labels.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Y-axis tick formatter applied to axis tick labels (vertical orientation).

examples.title_fallback: Horizontal bullet chart with three KPI bullets
examples.code:
<OrigamChartBullet
    :series="kpiSeries"
    :categories="['Revenue', 'Margin', 'NPS']"
    bar-color="primary"
    target-color="danger"
    orientation="horizontal"
/>

entry.name: IChartBulletRange
entry.description_fallback: One qualitative range band in a bullet chart. Bands are rendered left-to-right (horizontal) or bottom-to-top (vertical) and stack to cover the domain [0, maxRange].
entry.definition:
export interface IChartBulletRange {
    /**
     * Upper bound of this band (absolute value on the axis, not a
     * width / height fraction). Bands are rendered in array order —
     * each band covers [previous.to, this.to].
     */
    to: number
    /**
     * Fill colour for this band. Accepts a TIntent token or a raw CSS
     * colour string. When absent the component cycles through
     * `rangeColors`.
     */
    color?: TIntent | string
}

props.name: to
props.description_fallback: Upper bound of this band (absolute value on the axis, not a width / height fraction). Bands are rendered in array order — each band covers [previous.to, this.to].

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Fill colour for this band. Accepts a TIntent token or a raw CSS colour string. When absent the component cycles through rangeColors.

examples.title_fallback: Defining three qualitative range bands for a bullet
examples.code:
import type { IChartBulletRange } from 'origam'

const ranges: IChartBulletRange[] = [
    { to: 50 },            // poor — uses rangeColors[0]
    { to: 75, color: 'warning' },
    { to: 100, color: 'success' },
]

entry.name: IChartCandlestickDatum
entry.description_fallback: One OHLC data point in a candlestick series. Supplies the date label plus the four price levels (open, high, low, close) for the period. A datum missing any of the four price fields is silently skipped by the chart.

props.name: date
props.description_fallback: ISO date string or any human-readable label rendered on the X axis.

const data: IChartCandlestickDatum[] = [

entry.name: IChartCandlestickProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartCandlestick> — the financial OHLC chart. Renders one candlestick per datum with a body between open/close and a wick from low to high. Extends IChartBaseProps (omitting categories).
entry.definition:
export interface IChartCandlestickProps extends Omit<IChartBaseProps, 'categories'> {
    /**
     * Chart height. Accepts a number (interpreted as `px`) or any valid
     * CSS length. Ignored when `aspectRatio` is set. Default `400`.
     */
    height?: number | string
    /**
     * Fill colour for bullish candles (close ≥ open). Accepts a `TIntent`
     * or any CSS colour string. Default `'success'`.
     */
    bullishColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Fill colour for bearish candles (close < open). Accepts a `TIntent`
     * or any CSS colour string. Default `'danger'`.
     */
    bearishColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Fraction of the per-slot width occupied by the candle body [0..1].
     * Default `0.6`.
     */
    candleWidth?: number
    /**
     * Wick stroke width in SVG user-units. Default `1`.
     */
    wickWidth?: number
    /**
     * Toggle the legend. Candlestick charts rarely need a legend — the
     * default is therefore `false`.
     */
    showLegend?: boolean
    /** Toggle the hover tooltip. Default `true`. */
    showTooltip?: boolean
    /** Render background grid lines. Default `true`. */
    showGrid?: boolean
    /** Render X / Y axes + tick labels. Default `true`. */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * Override the auto-computed Y axis minimum. When omitted the minimum
     * is derived from `min(low)` over all data with 5 % padding.
     */
    yMin?: number
    /**
     * Override the auto-computed Y axis maximum. When omitted the maximum
     * is derived from `max(high)` over all data with 5 % padding.
     */
    yMax?: number
    /** Formatter applied to X-axis (date) tick labels. */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /** Formatter applied to Y-axis (price) tick labels. */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: height
props.description_fallback: Chart height. Accepts a number (interpreted as px) or any valid CSS length. Ignored when aspectRatio is set.

props.name: bullishColor
props.description_fallback: Fill colour for bullish candles (close >= open). Default 'success'.

props.name: bearishColor
props.description_fallback: Fill colour for bearish candles (close < open). Default 'danger'.

props.name: candleWidth
props.description_fallback: Fraction of the per-slot width occupied by the candle body [0..1]. Default 0.6.

props.name: wickWidth
props.description_fallback: Wick stroke width in SVG user-units. Default 1.

props.name: showLegend
props.description_fallback: Toggle the legend. Candlestick charts rarely need a legend — default is false.

props.name: showTooltip
props.description_fallback: Toggle the hover tooltip. Default true.

props.name: showGrid
props.description_fallback: Render background grid lines. Default true.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render X / Y axes + tick labels. Default true.

props.name: yMin
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y axis minimum. When omitted derived from min(low) with 5% padding.

props.name: yMax
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y axis maximum. When omitted derived from max(high) with 5% padding.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to X-axis (date) tick labels.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to Y-axis (price) tick labels.

examples.title_fallback: Basic OHLC candlestick chart setup
examples.code:
<OrigamChartCandlestick
    :series="[{ name: 'AAPL', data: ohlcData }]"
    bullish-color="success"
    bearish-color="danger"
    :candle-width="0.7"
    :show-axis="true"
/>

entry.name: IChartCartesianEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emits surfaced by <OrigamChartCartesian>. Extends IChartBaseEmits with drilldown navigation events (drill / drill-up) and zoom interaction events (zoom / reset-zoom).

<OrigamChartCartesian
    :series="series"
    :drilldown="drilldownConfig"

entry.name: IChartCartesianProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartCartesian> — the cartesian family component. Owns the X+Y plotting area and all cartesian topologies: line, area, bar, column, scatter, spline, stepped-line. Supports stacking, smoothing, drilldown, zoom, annotations, plot bands/lines, and a secondary Y axis.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartCartesianProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /** Cartesian visualisation primitive. Default `'line'`. */
    type?: TChartCartesianKind
    /**
     * Stack series on top of each other. Applies to `bar`,
     * `column`, and (when combined) `area`. Default `false`.
     */
    stacked?: boolean
    /**
     * Stacking mode when `stacked=true`.
     *
     * - `'normal'`  — raw absolute values (default).
     * - `'percent'` — every stack normalised to 100 %; Y-axis fixed
     *                 `0 → 100`, tick labels use `${v}%`.
     */
    stacking?: TChartStacking
    /**
     * Smoothing strategy for `line` / `area` / `spline`.
     * Default `'none'` for `line` / `area`, `'monotone'` for
     * `spline` (overridable).
     */
    smoothing?: TChartSmoothing
    /** Override the auto-computed Y min. */
    yMin?: number
    /** Override the auto-computed Y max. */
    yMax?: number
    /** Render grid lines behind the plot. Default `true`. */
    showGrid?: boolean
    /** Render X / Y axes + tick labels. Default `true`. */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /** Toggle the hover tooltip. Default `true`. */
    showTooltip?: boolean
    /** Formatter applied to X-axis tick labels. */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /** Formatter applied to Y-axis tick labels. */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
    /**
     * Configuration for the secondary (right-hand) Y axis. When
     * provided, series with `yAxis: 1` are projected against this
     * scale. The axis is only rendered when at least one visible
     * series uses `yAxis: 1` OR when this prop is explicitly set.
     */
    secondaryYAxis?: IChartSecondaryYAxis
    /**
     * Coloured rectangular zones drawn behind (or above) the chart
     * data. Cartesian-only. Bands with `layer='below'` (default)
     * are drawn before the series paths; `layer='above'` after.
     */
    plotBands?: Array<IChartPlotBand>
    /**
     * Threshold lines drawn at a fixed axis value. Cartesian-only.
     * Lines default to `layer='above'` so they remain visible over
     * data; set `layer='below'` to draw them behind.
     */
    plotLines?: Array<IChartPlotLine>
    /**
     * Drilldown configuration. When provided, data points that carry
     * an `IChartDrilldownLink` in their object-form entry trigger a
     * chart-level navigation instead of (or alongside) `point-click`.
     * A breadcrumb `<nav>` appears above the chart when depth > 1.
     */
    drilldown?: IChartDrilldownProps
    /**
     * Enable zoom / pan interactions on the plot area.
     *
     * - Mouse-down + drag → draws a selection rectangle; release zooms
     *   to that X range.
     * - Shift + scroll-wheel → zooms in / out around the cursor X.
     * - Ctrl + drag → pans left / right.
     * - A "Reset zoom" button appears in the top-right when zoomed.
     *
     * Default `false`.
     */
    zoomable?: boolean
    /**
     * Optional band-style range-selector toolbar rendered above the chart.
     * Provides preset zoom buttons (`1w`, `1m`, `3m`, `6m`, `1y`, `all`).
     * Requires `zoomable` to be `true` for full effect but can be used
     * independently to set an initial window via `selected`.
     */
    rangeSelector?: IChartRangeSelector
    /**
     * Overlay annotations drawn on top of the series layer. Annotations
     * are positioned in data coordinates and projected to SVG pixel space
     * at render time. Cartesian-only — non-cartesian chart families ignore
     * this prop.
     *
     * Four kinds: `'arrow'`, `'label'`, `'circle'`, `'bracket'`.
     */
    annotations?: Array<IChartAnnotation>
}

props.name: type
props.description_fallback: Cartesian visualisation primitive. Default 'line'.

props.name: stacked
props.description_fallback: Stack series on top of each other. Applies to bar, column, and area. Default false.

props.name: stacking
props.description_fallback: Stacking mode when stacked=true. 'normal' = raw absolute values. 'percent' = every stack normalised to 100%.

props.name: smoothing
props.description_fallback: Smoothing strategy for line / area / spline. Default 'none' for line/area, 'monotone' for spline.

props.name: yMin
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y min.

props.name: yMax
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed Y max.

props.name: showGrid
props.description_fallback: Render grid lines behind the plot. Default true.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render X / Y axes + tick labels. Default true.

props.name: showTooltip
props.description_fallback: Toggle the hover tooltip. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to X-axis tick labels.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to Y-axis tick labels.

props.name: secondaryYAxis
props.description_fallback: Configuration for the secondary (right-hand) Y axis. Series with yAxis: 1 are projected against this scale.

props.name: plotBands
props.description_fallback: Coloured rectangular zones drawn behind or above the chart data.

props.name: plotLines
props.description_fallback: Threshold lines drawn at a fixed axis value.

props.name: drilldown
props.description_fallback: Drilldown configuration. Data points carrying an IChartDrilldownLink trigger chart-level navigation on click.

props.name: zoomable
props.description_fallback: Enable zoom / pan interactions: drag to zoom, shift+scroll, ctrl+drag. Default false.

props.name: rangeSelector
props.description_fallback: Optional band-style range-selector toolbar with preset zoom buttons (1w, 1m, 3m, 6m, 1y, all).

props.name: annotations
props.description_fallback: Overlay annotations drawn on top of the series layer. Four kinds: 'arrow', 'label', 'circle', 'bracket'.

examples.title_fallback: Stacked column chart with zoom and a plot line
examples.code:
<OrigamChartCartesian
    type="column"
    :series="series"
    :categories="months"
    :stacked="true"
    stacking="percent"
    :zoomable="true"
    :plot-lines="[{ value: 50, color: 'danger', label: 'Threshold' }]"
/>

entry.name: IChartDrilldownDataset
entry.description_fallback: A named sub-dataset associated with a drilldown level in a cartesian chart. The chart swaps its active series and categories with these values when the user clicks a point carrying a matching IChartDrilldownLink.

props.name: id
props.description_fallback: Unique identifier — must match IChartDrilldownLink.id on the parent point.

props.name: name
props.description_fallback: Human-readable name shown in the breadcrumb trail.

props.name: series
props.description_fallback: Series rendered when this dataset is active.

props.name: categories
props.description_fallback: X-axis category labels for the sub-dataset. When absent the chart falls back to numeric indices.

examples.title_fallback: Defining a drilldown sub-dataset
examples.code:
import type { IChartDrilldownDataset } from 'origam'

const dataset: IChartDrilldownDataset = {
    id: 'q1-detail',
    name: 'Q1 Details',
    categories: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'],
    series: [{ name: 'Sales', data: [42, 55, 61] }],
}

entry.name: IChartDrilldownFrame
entry.description_fallback: One frame in the navigation stack maintained internally by the cartesian chart drilldown system. The root frame is pushed on mount; each drill-in pushes an additional frame; the Back button pops the top frame.

props.name: name
props.description_fallback: Display name for this level, used in the breadcrumb.

props.name: series
props.description_fallback: Series rendered at this level.

props.name: categories
props.description_fallback: Category labels at this level.

examples.title_fallback: Internal frame shape — read-only reference for composable consumers

entry.name: IChartDrilldownLink
entry.description_fallback: Reference attached to a data point that signals a drilldown is available. When the user clicks a point carrying this link, the chart looks up the matching IChartDrilldownDataset by id and re-renders with the sub-dataset.

props.name: id
props.description_fallback: Identifier used to look up the matching dataset in IChartDrilldownProps.datasets.

props.name: name
props.description_fallback: Display name shown in the breadcrumb trail for this level.

examples.title_fallback: Attaching a drilldown link to a data point

entry.name: IChartDrilldownProps
entry.description_fallback: Chart-level prop that wires up the drilldown feature on <OrigamChartCartesian> or <OrigamChartPolar>. Supplies the bank of sub-datasets and an optional Back button label for the breadcrumb navigation.

props.name: datasets
props.description_fallback: Bank of named sub-datasets. Looked up by IChartDrilldownLink.id on point-click.

props.name: backLabel
props.description_fallback: Localized label rendered on the Back button / first breadcrumb segment. Default '← Back'.

entry.name: IChartEmits
entry.description_fallback: Emits surfaced by <OrigamChart>. All payloads are plain serialisable data (no DOM refs) so callers can forward them to a store, websocket, or analytics layer without unwrapping.

examples.title_fallback: Listening to chart events
examples.code:
<OrigamChart
    :series="series"
    @point-click="(point, event) => console.log(point, event)"
    @legend-click="(series, index) => console.log(series, index)"
    @series-toggle="(series, visible) => console.log(series, visible)"
/>

entry.name: IChartGaugeGeometry
entry.description_fallback: Output of useChartGauge — geometry descriptors for the arc track, the indicator arc, and the label anchor points. All fields are pre-formatted so the SFC renders without computing anything itself.

props.name: trackPath
props.description_fallback: SVG d attribute for the full empty track arc.

props.name: valuePath
props.description_fallback: SVG d attribute for the filled value arc (empty when value === min).

props.name: valueAngle
props.description_fallback: Radian angle where the value arc ends. Useful for needles.

props.name: startAngle
props.description_fallback: Radian angle where the gauge arc starts.

props.name: endAngle
props.description_fallback: Radian angle where the gauge arc ends.

props.name: outerRadius
props.description_fallback: Outer arc radius in SVG pixels.

props.name: innerRadius
props.description_fallback: Inner arc radius in SVG pixels (outerRadius - thickness).

props.name: centerX
props.description_fallback: SVG pixel coordinate of the arc centre (X).

props.name: centerY
props.description_fallback: SVG pixel coordinate of the arc centre (Y).

props.name: ratio
props.description_fallback: Normalised value in [0..1].

props.name: clampedValue
props.description_fallback: Clamped value in [min..max].

examples.title_fallback: Consuming geometry in a custom gauge slot
examples.code:
// IChartGaugeGeometry is returned by useChartGauge — accessed via the gauge-value slot
<OrigamChartGauge :series="series" gauge-min="0" gauge-max="100">
    <template #gauge-value="{ value, ratio, formatted, unit }">
        <text :x="geometry.centerX" :y="geometry.centerY">
            {{ formatted }}{{ unit }}
        </text>
    </template>
</OrigamChartGauge>

entry.name: IChartGaugeProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartGauge> — solid gauge (radial progress indicator). Renders a 270-degree track with a filled arc indicating the current value, an optional centre label, and optional min / max endpoint labels. Only the first datum of the first series is consumed.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartGaugeProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Lower bound of the gauge range. Default `0`.
     */
    gaugeMin?: number
    /**
     * Upper bound of the gauge range. Default `100`.
     */
    gaugeMax?: number
    /**
     * Optional unit appended to the centre label (e.g. `'%'`,
     * `' km/h'`). Default `''`.
     */
    gaugeUnit?: string
    /**
     * Arc thickness in SVG pixels. Default `18`.
     */
    gaugeThickness?: number
    /**
     * Arc start angle in radians. Defaults to `-3pi/4` (bottom-left
     * of a 270deg arc centred on the bottom).
     */
    gaugeStartAngle?: number
    /**
     * Arc end angle in radians. Defaults to `+3pi/4` (bottom-right).
     */
    gaugeEndAngle?: number
    /**
     * Whether to render `gaugeMin` / `gaugeMax` labels at the arc
     * endpoints. Default `true`.
     */
    gaugeShowEndpoints?: boolean
    /**
     * Whether to render the centre value label. Default `true`.
     */

}

import type { IChartHeatmapDatum } from 'origam'

entry.name: IChartHeatmapProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartHeatmap> — rectangular heatmap grid where each cell is coloured by its value relative to the dataset min/max. Extends IChartBaseProps.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartHeatmapProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Explicit X-axis category ordering. When omitted, unique `x`
     * values from the dataset are sorted alphabetically / numerically.
     */
    xCategories?: Array<string>
    /**
     * Explicit Y-axis category ordering. When omitted, unique `y`
     * values from the dataset are sorted alphabetically / numerically.
     */
    yCategories?: Array<string>
    /**
     * Two-stop colour range used to interpolate cell colour.
     * First entry = min value colour, second = max value colour.
     * Accepts intent tokens or raw CSS colour strings.
     * Default `['info', 'danger']`.
     */
    colorRange?: [TIntent | string, TIntent | string]
    /**
     * Gap between cells in SVG user units. Default `2`.
     */
    cellGap?: number
    /**
     * Render the numeric value centred inside each cell when the
     * cell is wide/tall enough to accommodate it. Default `true`.
     */
    showLabel?: boolean
    /**
     * Render X and Y axis category labels along the grid edges.
     * Default `true`.
     */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * Gradient legend bar with min / max labels.
     * Default `true`.
     */
    showGradientLegend?: boolean
    /**
     * Anchor of the gradient legend. Default `'bottom'`.
     */
    legendPosition?: TChartLegendPosition
    /**
     * X-axis category label formatter. Applied to each column label.
     * When omitted, the raw string / number is displayed.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Y-axis / value formatter. Applied to row labels AND to
     * the min/max labels on the gradient legend.
     * When omitted, the raw number is displayed.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: xCategories
props.description_fallback: Explicit X-axis category ordering. When omitted, unique x values are sorted alphabetically / numerically.

props.name: yCategories
props.description_fallback: Explicit Y-axis category ordering. When omitted, unique y values are sorted alphabetically / numerically.

props.name: colorRange
props.description_fallback: Two-stop colour range used to interpolate cell colour. First entry = min value colour, second = max value colour. Default ['info', 'danger'].

props.name: cellGap
props.description_fallback: Gap between cells in SVG user units. Default 2.

props.name: showLabel
props.description_fallback: Render the numeric value centred inside each cell when the cell is wide/tall enough. Default true.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render X and Y axis category labels along the grid edges. Default true.

props.name: showGradientLegend
props.description_fallback: Gradient legend bar with min / max labels. Default true.

props.name: legendPosition
props.description_fallback: Anchor of the gradient legend. Default 'bottom'.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: X-axis category label formatter. Applied to each column label.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Y-axis / value formatter. Applied to row labels AND to the min/max labels on the gradient legend.

entry.name: IChartHoneycombProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartHoneycomb> — hexagonal tile-map where each tile is positioned by column (x) and row (y) index. Extends IChartBaseProps.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartHoneycombProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Hex vertex orientation.
     * `'pointy-top'` — vertex at the top (default).
     * `'flat-top'` — flat edge at the top, vertex on the side.
     */
    orientation?: TChartHoneycombOrientation
    /**
     * Colour-mapping strategy.
     * `'categorical'` — each tile gets a colour from `colorScheme` or the intent cycle.
     * `'heatmap'` — `value` drives a gradient between `heatmapColorRange` endpoints.
     */
    colorMode?: TChartHoneycombColorMode
    /**
     * Two-stop colour range for `colorMode='heatmap'`.
     * First entry = min value colour, second = max value colour.
     * Accepts intent tokens or raw CSS colours.
     * Default `['info', 'danger']`.
     */
    heatmapColorRange?: [TIntent | string, TIntent | string]
    /**
     * Hex side-length in SVG user units. Controls tile size.
     * Default `30`.
     */
    tileSize?: number
    /**
     * Gap between adjacent tiles in SVG user units. Default `2`.
     */
    tileGap?: number
    /**
     * Render the tile's `name` (or `value` when `name` is absent)
     * as text centred in the tile. Default `true`.
     */
    showLabel?: boolean
    /**
     * X-axis / column formatter. Applied to the numeric `x` index
     * in tooltip / axis text. When omitted the raw number is used.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: number | string) => string
    /**
     * Y-axis / row formatter. Applied to the numeric `y` index.
     * When omitted the raw number is used.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: orientation
props.description_fallback: Hex vertex orientation. 'pointy-top' — vertex at the top (default). 'flat-top' — flat edge at the top.

props.name: colorMode
props.description_fallback: Colour-mapping strategy. 'categorical' — intent cycle; 'heatmap' — gradient between heatmapColorRange endpoints.

props.name: heatmapColorRange
props.description_fallback: Two-stop colour range for colorMode='heatmap'. First entry = min, second = max. Default ['info', 'danger'].

props.name: tileSize
props.description_fallback: Hex side-length in SVG user units. Default 30.

props.name: tileGap
props.description_fallback: Gap between adjacent tiles in SVG user units. Default 2.

props.name: showLabel
props.description_fallback: Render the tile's name (or value) as text centred in the tile. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: X-axis / column formatter applied to the numeric x index in tooltip / axis text.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Y-axis / row formatter applied to the numeric y index.

examples.title_fallback: Categorical tile-map with flat-top orientation
examples.code:
<OrigamChartHoneycomb
    :series="[{ name: 'States', data: [...] }]"
    orientation="flat-top"
    color-mode="categorical"
    :tile-size="40"
/>

entry.name: IChartMapProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartMap>. Supports two modes: choropleth (country shapes coloured by interpolated value) and flight-routes (curved arcs between pairs of country centroids). Extends IChartBaseProps.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartMapProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Rendering mode. Default `'choropleth'`.
     */
    mode?: TChartMapMode
    /**
     * Colour gradient endpoints for choropleth mode.
     * First colour = min value; second colour = max value.
     * Supports intent names and raw CSS strings.
     * Default `['info', 'danger']`.
     */
    colorRange?: [TIntent | string, TIntent | string]
    /**
     * Fill colour for countries that have no value in the dataset.
     * Default `'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'`.
     */
    defaultCountryFill?: string
    /**
     * Stroke colour applied to all country path outlines.
     * Default `'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'`.
     */
    borderColor?: string
    /**
     * Default stroke colour for flight-route arcs.
     * Overridden per route via `IChartMapRouteDatum.color`.
     * Default `'primary'`.
     */
    lineColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Radius in SVG pixels of the endpoint circles on each route.
     * Default `4`.
     */
    nodeRadius?: number
    /**
     * Bezier control-point offset as a fraction of the chord length [0..1].
     * `0` = straight line; `0.3` = gentle arc (default); `0.5` = visible arc.
     */
    routeCurvature?: number
    /**
     * Y-axis value formatter used in tooltips and the choropleth legend.
     * When omitted, values are displayed as-is.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: mode
props.description_fallback: Rendering mode. Default 'choropleth'.

props.name: colorRange
props.description_fallback: Colour gradient endpoints for choropleth mode. First colour = min value; second colour = max value. Default ['info', 'danger'].

props.name: defaultCountryFill
props.description_fallback: Fill colour for countries that have no value in the dataset. Default 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'.

props.name: borderColor
props.description_fallback: Stroke colour applied to all country path outlines. Default 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'.

props.name: lineColor
props.description_fallback: Default stroke colour for flight-route arcs. Overridden per route via IChartMapRouteDatum.color. Default 'primary'.

props.name: nodeRadius
props.description_fallback: Radius in SVG pixels of the endpoint circles on each route. Default 4.

props.name: routeCurvature
props.description_fallback: Bezier control-point offset as a fraction of the chord length [0..1]. 0 = straight line; 0.3 = gentle arc (default).

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Y-axis value formatter used in tooltips and the choropleth legend.

examples.title_fallback: World choropleth by population density
examples.code:
<OrigamChartMap
    :series="[{ name: 'Population', data: densityData }]"
    mode="choropleth"
    :color-range="['info', 'danger']"
    :y-axis-format="v => v.toLocaleString()"
/>

entry.name: IChartParetoProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartPareto> — combines vertical columns sorted descending by value with a cumulative percentage line on a secondary right Y-axis. Typical uses: quality control, root-cause analysis, 80/20 rule. Extends IChartBaseProps.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartParetoProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Colour of all columns. Accepts a `TIntent` token or any raw CSS
     * colour string. Default `'primary'`.
     */
    barColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Colour of the cumulative percentage line. Accepts a `TIntent` token
     * or any raw CSS colour string. Default `'danger'`.
     */
    lineColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Gap in SVG pixels between adjacent columns. Default `4`.
     */
    barGap?: number
    /**
     * Whether to render the cumulative percentage line. Default `true`.
     */
    showLine?: boolean
    /**
     * Whether to show a value label above each column. Default `false`.
     */
    showLabel?: boolean
    /**
     * Render X (category) and Y (value + percentage) axes. Default `true`.
     */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * Render horizontal grid lines aligned with Y-axis ticks. Default `true`.
     */
    showGrid?: boolean
    /**
     * Formatter applied to X-axis category tick labels.
     * When omitted the category string is shown as-is.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Formatter applied to the left Y-axis (value) tick labels.
     * When omitted the raw number is used.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
    /**
     * Formatter applied to the right Y-axis (cumulative %) tick labels.
     * Default formats as rounded integer percentage, e.g. `"80%"`.
     */
    cumulativeFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: barColor
props.description_fallback: Colour of all columns. Accepts a TIntent token or any raw CSS colour string. Default 'primary'.

props.name: lineColor
props.description_fallback: Colour of the cumulative percentage line. Default 'danger'.

props.name: barGap
props.description_fallback: Gap in SVG pixels between adjacent columns. Default 4.

props.name: showLine
props.description_fallback: Whether to render the cumulative percentage line. Default true.

props.name: showLabel
props.description_fallback: Whether to show a value label above each column. Default false.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Render X (category) and Y (value + percentage) axes. Default true.

props.name: showGrid
props.description_fallback: Render horizontal grid lines aligned with Y-axis ticks. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to X-axis category tick labels.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the left Y-axis (value) tick labels.

props.name: cumulativeFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the right Y-axis (cumulative %) tick labels. Default formats as rounded integer percentage, e.g. "80%".

examples.title_fallback: Pareto chart for defect root-cause analysis
examples.code:
<OrigamChartPareto
    :series="[{ name: 'Defects', data: defects }]"
    bar-color="primary"
    line-color="danger"
    :show-label="true"
    :cumulative-format="v => `${Math.round(v * 100)}%`"
/>

entry.name: IChartPath
entry.description_fallback: Output of useChart() — one path descriptor per series (or per data point for bar/column/scatter/pie). The component renders each entry inside a <g> according to kind.

props.name: seriesIndex
props.description_fallback: Zero-based index of the parent series.

props.name: kind
props.description_fallback: SVG element kind to emit. path for line/area/pie/donut/radar, rect for bar/column, circle for scatter + line/area markers.

props.name: d
props.description_fallback: Pre-computed d attribute for kind === 'path' | 'polygon'.

props.name: rect
props.type_label: { x: number, y: number, width: number, height: number }
props.description_fallback: Geometry for kind === 'rect'.

props.name: circle
props.type_label: { cx: number, cy: number, r: number }
props.description_fallback: Geometry for kind === 'circle'.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Resolved CSS colour string.

props.name: series
props.description_fallback: Original series reference (for tooltip / legend).

props.name: dataIndex
props.description_fallback: Optional data index when the path represents a single point.

props.name: pathLength
props.description_fallback: Length of the path (used by stroke-dashoffset animation).

props.name: variant
props.description_fallback: Sub-kind for kind === 'path'. Area charts emit two paths per series — the filled area (variant: 'fill') and the overlaid stroke (variant: 'stroke').

props.description_fallback: Number of filled icon slots.

props.description_fallback: Resolved fill CSS colour string.

props.description_fallback: Y translation for the column group (SVG coordinate).

entry.name: IChartPictorialProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartPictorial> — the pictorial / isotype family. Each data value is represented as a column of repeated SVG icons; filled icons count = Math.round(value / iconsPerUnit). Extends IChartBaseProps with icon appearance, direction, and rendering mode.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartPictorialProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * SVG `<path d="…">` string for the icon drawn in each slot.
     * Must fit a `viewBox="0 0 24 24"` coordinate system.
     * Default: person silhouette.
     */
    icon?: string
    /**
     * Colour applied to all filled icons. Accepts a `TIntent` name or
     * any raw CSS colour string. When omitted, colours cycle through
     * `colorScheme` by series index (first series → first colour, etc.).
     */
    iconColor?: TIntent | string
    /**
     * Colour painted on "background" icon slots that are not yet filled.
     * Default `'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'`.
     */
    emptyIconColor?: string
    /**
     * How many data units one icon represents.
     * E.g. `iconsPerUnit=10` → a value of 65 renders 7 filled icons
     * (rounded). Default `1`.
     */
    iconsPerUnit?: number
    /**
     * Stacking direction.
     * - `'vertical'` — icons stacked bottom-to-top (traditional column).
     * - `'horizontal'` — icons stacked left-to-right.
     * Default `'vertical'`.
     */
    direction?: TChartPictorialDirection
    /**
     * Rendering mode.
     * - `'stack'` — classic isotype: rows of small repeated icons (default).
     * - `'fill'` — one large icon per category, clip-masked from the bottom
     *   up to the fill ratio, like a thermometer / glass fill effect.
     *   The unfilled portion shows the icon silhouette as a faint "shadow".
     */
    mode?: TChartPictorialMode
    /**
     * Display the raw value label above (vertical) or to the right
     * (horizontal) of each column. Default `true`.
     */
    showLabel?: boolean
    /**
     * Display the X-axis category labels. Default `true`.
     */
    showAxis?: boolean
    /**
     * X-axis / category label formatter. Identity by default.
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Y-axis / value formatter. `String(value)` by default.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: icon
props.description_fallback: SVG <path d="…"> string for the icon drawn in each slot. Must fit a viewBox="0 0 24 24" coordinate system. Default: person silhouette.

props.name: iconColor
props.description_fallback: Colour applied to all filled icons. Accepts a TIntent name or any raw CSS colour string. When omitted, colours cycle through colorScheme by series index.

props.name: emptyIconColor
props.description_fallback: Colour painted on background icon slots that are not yet filled. Default "rgba(0,0,0,0.1)".

props.name: iconsPerUnit
props.description_fallback: How many data units one icon represents. E.g. iconsPerUnit=10 → a value of 65 renders 7 filled icons (rounded). Default 1.

props.name: direction
props.description_fallback: Stacking direction — "vertical" stacks icons bottom-to-top, "horizontal" stacks them left-to-right. Default "vertical".

props.name: mode
props.description_fallback: Rendering mode — "stack" = classic isotype rows of small icons (default); "fill" = one large icon per category clip-masked to the fill ratio.

props.name: showLabel
props.description_fallback: Display the raw value label above (vertical) or to the right (horizontal) of each column. Default true.

props.name: showAxis
props.description_fallback: Display the X-axis category labels. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: X-axis / category label formatter. Identity by default.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Y-axis / value formatter. String(value) by default.

examples.title_fallback: Isotype chart with custom icon and fill mode
examples.code:
<OrigamChartPictorial
    :series="[{ name: 'Users', data: [3, 7, 5] }]"
    :categories="['Mon', 'Wed', 'Fri']"
    :iconsPerUnit="1"
    mode="fill"
    direction="vertical"
    iconColor="primary"
/>

props.description_fallback: Replace the default tooltip card. Receives the hovered point, its series and the resolved category label.

props.name: empty
props.description_fallback: Rendered when series is empty or has no data.

entry.name: IChartPlotBand
entry.description_fallback: A coloured rectangular zone drawn behind (or above) chart data, spanning a numeric range along either the X or Y axis. Applicable to cartesian-family charts only — not for polar, radar or gauge.

props.name: axis
props.description_fallback: Axis the band spans. "y" shades a horizontal stripe; "x" shades a vertical stripe. Default "y".

props.name: from
props.description_fallback: Lower bound in axis units. String when axis="x" and categories are strings.

props.name: to
props.description_fallback: Upper bound in axis units.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Fill colour. Accepts a TIntent token name or any CSS colour string. Default resolves to the warning intent bg token.

props.name: opacity
props.description_fallback: Fill opacity in the 0..1 range. Default 0.15.

props.name: label
props.description_fallback: Optional label rendered centred inside the band.

props.name: labelColor
props.description_fallback: Label fill colour. Accepts a TIntent token or CSS colour. Default "currentColor".

props.name: layer
props.description_fallback: Z-order relative to chart data. "below" (default) — drawn behind series; "above" — drawn on top of data.

examples.title_fallback: Highlighting a warning zone with a plot band
examples.code:
<OrigamChart
    type="line"
    :series="series"
    :plotBands="[
        { axis: 'y', from: 60, to: 80, color: 'warning', opacity: 0.2, label: 'Warning zone' }
    ]"
/>

entry.name: IChartPlotLine
entry.description_fallback: A single threshold line drawn at a fixed axis value, either horizontally (Y-axis) or vertically (X-axis). Applicable to cartesian-family charts only — not for polar, radar or gauge.

props.name: axis
props.description_fallback: Axis the line is perpendicular to. "y" draws a horizontal line at a Y value; "x" draws a vertical line at an X value. Default "y".

props.name: value
props.description_fallback: Position on the axis in axis units. String when axis="x" and categories are strings.

props.name: color
props.description_fallback: Stroke colour. Accepts a TIntent token name or any CSS colour string. Default resolves to the danger intent bg token.

props.name: width
props.description_fallback: Stroke width in SVG user units. Default 1.5.

props.name: dash
props.description_fallback: Dash pattern of the line. Default "dashed".

props.name: label
props.description_fallback: Optional label placed at the end of the line.

props.name: labelAlign
props.description_fallback: Horizontal alignment of the label for Y-axis lines. "right" (default) places the label at the right edge; "left" at the left edge.

props.name: layer
props.description_fallback: Z-order relative to chart data. "below" — drawn behind series; "above" (default) — drawn on top of data so the line remains visible.

    type="bar"

    ]"
/>

props.name: dataIndex
props.description_fallback: Index of the data point inside the series.

props.description_fallback: X coordinate (number or category string).

entry.name: IChartPolarBarProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartPolarBar> — the polar bar (nightingale-rose) family. A single series of N data points is rendered as N wedge-shaped arcs arranged radially. Commonly used for cyclical data (hours per day, monthly activity). Extends IChartBaseProps.
entry.definition:
export interface IChartPolarBarProps extends IChartBaseProps {
    /**
     * Fraction of the total radius reserved as a centre hole.
     * `0` = no hole (wedges meet at the centre point).
     * `1` = zero-thickness ring.
     * Default `0.1`.
     */
    innerRadius?: number
    /**
     * Start angle in radians for the first wedge.
     * `0` = 3 o'clock (standard mathematical).
     * `-Math.PI / 2` = 12 o'clock (conventional chart orientation).
     * Default `0`.
     */
    startAngle?: number
    /**
     * Angular gap between consecutive wedges in radians.
     * `0` = no gap (wedges are flush).
     * Default `0.02`.
     */
    gap?: number
    /**
     * Override the auto-computed maximum value used to scale wedge radii.
     * When omitted, `max(series[0].data)` is used.
     */
    maxValue?: number
    /**
     * Render the category label outside the outer radius of each wedge.
     * Default `true`.
     */
    showLabel?: boolean
    /**
     * Render the numeric value label inside the wedge when there is
     * sufficient angular room. Default `false`.
     */
    showValue?: boolean
    /**
     * Formatter applied to the tooltip X label (category name / index).
     */
    xAxisFormat?: (value: string | number) => string
    /**
     * Formatter applied to the tooltip Y value and the in-wedge value label.
     */
    yAxisFormat?: (value: number) => string
}

props.name: innerRadius
props.description_fallback: Fraction of the total radius reserved as a centre hole. 0 = no hole (wedges meet at centre). 1 = zero-thickness ring. Default 0.1.

props.name: startAngle
props.description_fallback: Start angle in radians for the first wedge. 0 = 3 o'clock; -Math.PI/2 = 12 o'clock (conventional). Default 0.

props.name: gap
props.description_fallback: Angular gap between consecutive wedges in radians. 0 = no gap (flush). Default 0.02.

props.name: maxValue
props.description_fallback: Override the auto-computed maximum value used to scale wedge radii. When omitted, max(series[0].data) is used.

props.name: showLabel
props.description_fallback: Render the category label outside the outer radius of each wedge. Default true.

props.name: showValue
props.description_fallback: Render the numeric value label inside the wedge when there is sufficient angular room. Default false.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the tooltip X label (category name / index).

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the tooltip Y value and the in-wedge value label.

examples.title_fallback: Nightingale-rose chart for weekly activity
examples.code:
<OrigamChartPolarBar
    :series="[{ name: 'Activity', data: [12, 8, 15, 6, 20, 18, 9] }]"
    :categories="['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun']"
    :innerRadius="0.15"
    :startAngle="-Math.PI / 2"
    showLabel
    showValue
/>

entry.name: IChartPolarProps
entry.description_fallback: Props for <OrigamChartPolar> — handles pie and donut visualisations. No axes, no grid, no tick labels. Extends IChartBaseProps with polar-specific options including donut hole size, drilldown configuration, and axis formatters.

props.name: type
props.description_fallback: Polar visualisation primitive. Default "pie".

props.name: donutHoleSize
props.description_fallback: Inner-radius proportion for "donut". 0 collapses to a pie, 1 to a zero-thickness ring. Ignored when type="pie". Default 0.6.

props.name: showTooltip
props.description_fallback: Toggle the hover tooltip. Default true.

props.name: xAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the tooltip X label. Pie tooltips show the category name + value.

props.name: yAxisFormat
props.description_fallback: Formatter applied to the tooltip Y value.

props.name: drilldown
props.description_fallback: Drilldown configuration. When provided, data points that carry an IChartDrilldownLink trigger a chart-level navigation. A breadcrumb <nav> appears above the chart when depth > 1.

    type="donut"
